actors.name: James the Swordsman
actors.story: I have been a lot of things in my life: ship captain, duellist of great renown, and lover of the most beautiful noblewomen. After years of successes and victories, a mysterious child defeated me with deception. This despicable boy led me into the lair of a dangerous beast and, after imprisoning me, left me to be eaten by the monster. I survived, though I lost a hand... I know for certain he who I seek is no human, and I joined the Order to hunt down the child I hate above all else, and thus have my revenge.
descriptors: I am a skilled swordsman and possess fine manners, which is why the Order considers me an excellent candidate to move among High Society. I love indulging in good food and dissolute company.
I have learned to face monsters and aberrations without being intimidated. The Beast is on my trail because, having tasted my flesh, it can no longer do without it…
I am a man of the world and nothing can really surprise me anymore. I never question myself. After all, I’m the best at what I do.

gifts.name: With a Sword or a Smile
gifts.description: Once per Scene you may perform a gesture of extreme precision with your weapon, such as slipping an object off someone or writing something on a surface. The person observing your skill will either be impressed or intimidated, depending on the Storyteller’s decision. You receive 1 Additional Success when you use the emotion you have aroused to your advantage.

gifts.name: Tick-Tock, Here Comes The Beast
gifts.description:
While outdoors, you may ask the Storyteller for the Beast to come in search of your flesh. The Beast is a monstrous NPC with the following characteristics: OL Hard 7 – (4 Wounds).

Descriptor (the Beast): I am a great and mighty beast. I overwhelm everything I come across on my way to snatch my prey.

Gift – Ravenous Madness: The Beast has an insane craving for your flesh, and will unleash its rage on anyone standing in its way. With its titanic strength, it can tear down trees and walls, and hurl a man away with a single swipe of its huge paws. The Beast is also quite stupid and will leave the Scene as soon as you are out of sight. You receive 2 Additional Successes to any Defense Check against it. If the Beast suffers the fourth Wound, it will dissolve. However, it will regenerate and can be used in the next Scene.

darkEgo.name: Dark Ego - I Will Have My Satisfaction
darkEgo.description: When you choose an opponent, there is no escape for them. Once per Scene, you can take an additional action against the target of your challenge (even if you had already acted during this Exchange) to anticipate their move and stop their action with yours. If an opponent inflicts a Wound on you, you savor the taste of the challenge and receive 1 Additional Success at each Check against them for the rest of the Scenario.
darkEgo.trigger: You challenge an enemy or otherwise make clear who and how skilled you are.

actors.equipment: A fine dueling blade / a black powder gun / a finely crafted hook / a purple-red cloak / traveling boots / a precious pair of binoculars / several valuable rings.

actors.name: Garou the Old Wolf
actors.story: I am a mountain wolf and far more cunning than the stupid villagers who tremble at the mere sight of me. I have lived proudly at the head of my pack, leading a thousand raids and eating succulent, tender morsels of human flesh. But I am not so old I cannot face those who hate me the most, though I may be hunted and reviled. Now that I’m part of the Order, I use my strength to defend the weak hunters who are my companions, knowing that with a single bite I could end their insignificant lives.
descriptors: My senses are unfailing. Nothing can escape my sense of smell and that is why the Order uses me as a guardian. I hate strong smells and loud noises because they feel like burning irons to acute senses.

A true predator knows how to appear as the most helpless of lambs. I know how to disguise myself. My confidence is boundless and I often tend to underestimate danger, ready to risk anything for a tasty bite.
I am fiercer and more powerful than any human and my fangs can pierce even metal. My proud wolf spirit is everything to me.

gifts.name: Find Them Forever After
gifts.description: Once you catch someone’s scent, you never forget it. During a Scene, you can spend 1 Soma to memorize the scent of a person you are interacting with. You will always recognize it and it will be easy for you to follow its traces even after some time. If you concentrate, you can hear a noise even at great distances. When someone approaches you, the Storyteller will warn you long before anyone else in the Scene would notice.

gifts.name: Wolf Among the Lambs
gifts.description: You may spend 1 Soma to assume the shape of a common human. Create a Descriptor that represents you and includes at least one of these words: Old, Helpless, Weak. In your human form you can speak and act without problems, but, as soon as you use your Dark Ego, you will immediately lose the effect of Wolf Among the Lambs. You receive 1 Additional Success when you use the Descriptor you created to deceive someone and catch them off guard.

darkEgo.name: Dark Ego - The Big Bad Wolf
darkEgo.description: You are hardened by a lifetime in the great mountains and your skill is matched only by your courage. When you unleash your rage, create a Descriptor for it that includes at least one of these words: Strong, Fierce, Unstoppable. You can employ the strength of three men, gnaw through stone as easily as flesh, or break down any barrier. When you act using this special Descriptor for Position Checks, you get 1 Additional Success. Once per Scene, you can unleash your rage and receive 3 Additional Successes instead of 1.
darkEgo.trigger: You assume the form of a Wolf or reveal yourself for what you really are, scaring off weak humans.

actors.equipment: Fangs and claws (natural weapons) / a necklace of stones and wood that I carry in a paw—token of the only human I do not consider food / knick-knacks, keys, and other junk that I sometimes vomit up from my large stomach.

actors.name: The Astonishing Pied Piper Without a Name
actors.story: I have always made my art my reason for living. I can play so skillfully that it might as well be magic. I have learned to use the power of music to reach into the souls of both humans and animals. Unfortunately, I have lost count of the number of times I have performed dishonorable acts while pursuing the perfect melody. Having been guilty of various crimes and having taken revenge on those who mocked my sincere love for music, I serenely waited for my execution. The Order freed me in exchange for a promise to serve them and put my skills to work in the fight against Darkness. It was in the darkest moments that I glimpsed the perfect melody, so perhaps as a Hunter, I can find it and make it my own.
descriptors: With my pipe I can play any melody and touch the hearts of living beings. Art needs time to express itself.

I am a skilled acrobat and musician. My talent is unrivaled and the Order has chosen me for my ability to capture people’s attention and stimulate their emotions. When I am in the grip of artistic inspiration, I am totally divorced from reality.
As an artist I have traveled to many places and I know many myths and legends. I’m hungry for knowledge and I’m fascinated by everything I don’t know.

gifts.name: Soul Music
gifts.description:
When you play your pipes you can spend 1 Soma to sing a special melody. Choose from:
1. Imparting an emotion: Create a Descriptor that represents the emotional state you wish to convey. Everybody present will receive that Descriptor for the current Scene. You may have to make a Position Check to affect opponents.
2. Bewitching animals: You may give simple commands to animals that hear your melody. If they show an aggressive attitude, you have to make a successful Position Check for your melody to take effect. As long as you are playing, you may ask the animals to do simple actions such as moving or following a simple command.

gifts.name: Skilled Acrobat
gifts.description:
When you sing, dance, or move with grace, you always put on a great show. As an additional action, you can spend 1 Soma and decide on one of the following effects:
1. You can make an incredible leap, many feet high, without anyone being able to stop you.
2. You may take an object, even if it is worn by an enemy.
3. You can perform a minor action with a stunt, such as opening a door or flipping a switch, and then return exactly to where you started.

darkEgo.name: Dark Ego - The Power of Music
darkEgo.description: Once per Scene, you can make a sound that can be heard by whomever you wish, even from a great distance. Everyone who hears it suffers 1 Wound, fragile objects break, and frightened animals flee. Alternatively, you can play a gentle melody and the wind itself will obey you, carrying your message to whomever you wish, wherever they are. When using The Power of Music, you can also activate a Soul Music effect on one or more targets of your choice.
darkEgo.trigger: Demonstrate your art to its fullest extent, with a show that cannot be ignored.

actors.equipment: A precious pipe of the finest workmanship / a theater mask / a cloak of many colors / multicolored chalks and powders / an old ocarina (the first instrument I ever played), and Hamelin / my faithful trained mouse.

actors.name: Baba yaga The Child Witch
actors.story: I am a child witch, and my power is equal only to my ambition. I did not have a childhood, for I was born already aware of my abilities. To most, I seem cynical and cruel. That is because they do not understand that they are pawns, insignificant pieces in the bloody games that witches and warlocks play. The Order does not look down on my age, which is why it has given me the leadership I deserve.
descriptors: I am a sorceress and my magical powers allow me to do whatever I want. I need the right amount of time to cast my spells.
I am very skilled at reading people, that is why the Order has chosen me as leader of the Hunters. I love manipulating people and I often do it merely to amuse myself.

Like any respectable sorceress, I carry my trusty bag full of herbs, poisons, and all kinds of magic tools. My childlike appearance is often useful, but sometimes it leads others to underestimate me. I hate that.

gifts.name: Magic
gifts.description: When you want to achieve something, you may use witchcraft. Choose what you want with a sentence like: I want to fly on that old broom, or I want to look like a demon in the eyes of those fools. Your spell must be focused on an object in your possession, such as a broom to fly or a mask you can wear to look like a demon. Pay a cost from 0 to 2 Soma, decided by the Storyteller, to activate your spell for the duration of a Scene. Remember that you can’t ask for someone’s sudden death, but you can inflict Wounds with your actions through magic.

gifts.name: Listen to my Words
gifts.description: Once per Scene, when you talk to someone, you can ask the Storyteller a question about them. The question must be regarding their behaviour, such as any vices or their desires they might have. You gain 1 Additional Success in any action where you exploit what you’ve discovered.

darkEgo.name: Dark Ego - The Evil Witch
darkEgo.description:
Receive 1 Additional Success on any Check when you use one of your spells, either through the Magic Gift or by inserting it into your narrative through the Descriptors. Moreover, you can unleash your evil aura to gain one or more of the following effects:
1. Animals and ordinary people are tormented by your presence and will flee in terror.
2. You gain 1 Additional Success if you use your magic to punish someone for breaking a promise or agreement you made earlier.
3. In the area around you, you can summon daylight or darkness.
darkEgo.trigger: Scare ordinary people or dispense punishment through your magic.

actors.equipment: An old and worn-out black cloak / a bag of magical ingredients / a small curved dagger / a rag doll / the Ring of the Order / a lucky elderberry branch / the keys of a strange hut in a tree which is always in my vicinity.

actors.name: Regina The Thief Of Hearts
actors.story: I was born to be a leader and I have always surrounded myself with faithful followers ready to satisfy my every whim. Lacking the benefit of noble birth, the power I held was pried from the hands of those less deserving to wield it, no matter the cost. I ruled armies of thugs, and broke the hearts of both men and women. After each conquest, I set out in search of a bigger challenge. Because there is still so much out there that should be rightfully mine, I always want more. The Order has given me a new purpose, a new perspective, and new creatures to enslave.
descriptors: I am determined to get what I want, and nothing will get in my way. I will kill, humiliate, or conquer anything that stands between me and my objective. As you can imagine, I sincerely hate being told no!

Thanks to my contacts and charisma, I always have an ace up my sleeve: followers ready to help me and allies who owe me favors. Maintaining an empire of beneficial connections requires commitment and resources.
I have an enviable charm and love to dress up to fit the role I have chosen. Even when I try to restrain myself, I never go unnoticed.

gifts.name: I Want It!
gifts.description: When you act with clear and direct intention to achieve an objective, you get 1 Additional Success on each Position Check. Once per Session, you can turn a Failure into an Outcome with Increment. Describe how you grit your teeth and fight to get what you want.

gifts.name: The Queen
gifts.description: During a Scene you always have a couple of trusted servants with you, ready to execute your every order. Create a Descriptor for each, which represents the skill for which you hold them in your service. Your servants will do their best to satisfy your every wish. Decide how you pay them. The Storyteller, when and if they deem it necessary, will ask you to honor their services so as not to lose the use of this Gift for the rest of the Scene. You can check this Descriptor multiple times to get XP.

darkEgo.name: Dark Ego - As I Want!
darkEgo.description: You know that your way is the only right way to do things. During the Scene, as an additional action, you can choose another character who will be issued a command. In the case of an ally, if they do exactly what you tell them, they will receive 1 Additional Success to their action or increase their Opposition Level by 1. If you give a peremptory order to ensnare an enemy, they will lower their Opposition Level by 1 or, if you’ve already seen it in action, you can prevent them from using one of their Gifts. Once per Scene, you can shout, drawing everyone’s attention to you. For a few moments, they will pause to listen to what you have to say.
darkEgo.trigger: Take control of a situation and impose your decisions by dramatically drawing attention to yourself.

actors.equipment: A long leather whip with metal studs and spikes / a beautiful fan to hide my face, dresses for every occasion / a long burgundy cape, gold and jewels gifted by countless suitors / a sharp stiletto I wear as a hairpin.

actors.name: Babai the Judge
actors.story: After years of honorable service as State Inquisitor of the Republic of Venice, my body and spirit have undergone a rare mutation and fear is now unknown to me. People have always called me Bogeyman, fearing the justice that I represented. Perhaps my own absence of fear made me even more terrifying in the eyes of mortals. The Order has given me a new assignment because even in the fight against darkness, someone needs to be ready to judge what is right and what is wrong.
descriptors: I am good at understanding, evaluating, and grasping every hidden detail, which is why the Order wanted me as a judge. I am cold, methodical, and cannot stand when plans change abruptly.
My body is made of pure shadow and I can become intangible for brief moments. I hate sunlight and cannot properly focus when not surrounded by a comforting shadow.
My presence intimidates people, touching the fear that dwells deep in their hearts. The presence of children and their innocent way of looking at the world makes me uneasy.

gifts.name: Eye of the Judge
gifts.description: Once per Scene, when you meet a group of NPCs you will immediately understand who is the most and the least capable of them. Moreover, the Storyteller will also reveal to you if there are relationships such as love, hate, or fidelity between two NPCs of your choice. Receive 1 Additional Success when you use the information you have discovered to intimidate or question someone.

gifts.name: Like a Shadow
gifts.description:
You can spend 1 Soma to manipulate the shadows to your advantage, choose from:
1. Acquire a small object, even if it is held by someone, as long as you can see it.
2. Make an object in your immediate vicinity topple down.
3. Stretch a shadow and manipulate its shape to make it look different.
Additionally, you always receive 1 Additional Success on any Defense Check you make while in a shaded area. If you get a successful Outcome, as an additional effect you can move from one shadow to another and no one can prevent it.

darkEgo.name: Dark Ego - If you don’t Stop, I’ll Call the Bogeyman!
darkEgo.description: You are like a sinuous shadow that can reach anywhere. During a Scene, you can arrive at a location by covering any distance and overcoming any obstacle if one of your allies or an NPC calls your name. When you manifest your true nature, everyone who witnesses it will be frightened and will not act against you unless you threaten them first. The Storyteller may ask you for a Position Check to frighten particularly powerful characters. Receive 1 Additional Success on all Defense Checks you make against the actions of someone who is now fearful.
darkEgo.trigger: Enter or leave a shadow by manifesting your true nature and scaring someone.

actors.equipment: A precious elegant black dress / a cape and a top hat / a sturdy cane with a hidden blade / a monocle lens / an exquisitely crafted Larva (typical mask of the Venice Carnival) / an accurate pocket watch.

actors.name: The Woman from the Wood
actors.story: My memory is gone. The first thing I remember is the Order finding me, wandering in the woods naked and covered in blood. I possess extraordinary strength and a feral instinct, such that any civilized society ought to chain me like a monster. I know that in my past is a sin so great, my memory could not bear the weight of it. But, I want to remember and perhaps by serving the Order I will be able to do so. I have a natural soft spot for children, and I can’t stand to see them get hurt. The Order uses me as a weapon in the most serious matters when it is necessary to act decisively and demonstrate that a Hunter is a force to be reckoned with.
descriptors: I am incredibly strong. Despite my petite looks, I am tougher than the sturdiest of men. I struggle to control my strength and often end up damaging things unintentionally.

Sometimes I manifest strange abilities, the legacy of a past that I no longer remember. But, when I need it, the world around me shapes itself to protect and shelter me. I hate being out in the open and being the center of attention.

I love human flesh and can gain insight about people just looking at them. I am helplessly attracted to those who have a particular physical trait that stimulates my appetite, such as a good smell or velvety skin.

gifts.name: The Woman from the Wood
gifts.description: You receive 1 Additional Success to any Position Check that requires you to resort to your strength. If you eliminate a living being by causing a Wound, you can do it in an extremely disturbing way. Anyone who witnesses it, at the discretion of the Storyteller, will lower their Opposition Level by 1 for the next action.

gifts.name: Home Sweet Home
gifts.description:
You can spend 1 Soma to draw on the strange powers of the witch you once were. When you do so, choose one of the following effects:
1. Create a shelter for one person, perfectly camouflaged within the environment.
2. Reshape a plant to create ladders, shields, or other simple structures.
3. Make something disgusting/rotten edible and sweet, restoring 1 Wound to whoever eats it (except yourself).

darkEgo.name: Dark Ego - Soft and Succulent Flesh
darkEgo.description: The truth is that you crave human flesh, especially when raw and taken from evil people. When you inflict a Wound through violent action on someone you deem evil, and if you reach an Outcome with an Increment, you may inflict 1 additional Wound. Once per Scene when you consume human flesh, you recover 1 Wound and the Storyteller will reveal some memories of the victim, giving you contextualized information about what you are looking for.
darkEgo.trigger: Blatantly manifest your desire to devour human flesh, regardless of the consequences.

actors.equipment: A doll and a little wooden soldier — the only items I had with me when I was found. A worn-out gray travel dress stained with blood. A sharp butcher’s knife. A hair ribbon, gift from a Hunter of the Order. A cookbook filled with recipes for cakes and sweets.

actors.name: TheImmortal
actors.story: I am a sorcerer who has found the key to immortality. Long life has only whetted my appetite for power and in its pursuit, I have been stained by every sin. The secret behind my unending existence is that I have hidden my soul, removing it from my body. Unfortunately, the Order found its hiding place and now it is held beyond my reach in a fortified church, leaving me no choice but to submit to their commands. Guilty of one thousand and one crimes, the Order demands I balance each with one thousand and one acts of virtue. According to those foolish preachers, they are leading me down the path of redemption. In truth, the Order treats me as a servant, giving to me only the most thankless tasks, knowing that I can not be subdued by death. I remain humble and silent, waiting for the day when I will discover where they have hidden my soul. Then I will unleash my revenge and annihilate the entire Papacy...
descriptors: I have knowledge and wisdom drawn from centuries of existence, which I can conjure to mind when needed. I often get lost in the memories of my past glories, forgetting about the world around me.

The Order uses my powers for their own purposes and I have had to become skilled at understanding and supporting the needs of my allies as a result. Although I hate to admit it, over time I have begun to take some pleasure in doing good deeds.

My body is but a tool which I can manipulate at will, far beyond common human limits. In spite of my old and emaciated appearance, I feel neither fatigue nor pain. With matters of the flesh no longer of concern, I value beautiful things and works of art above anything else.

gifts.name: Memories of an Infinite Life
gifts.description: You have been alive for an indefinite time and know almost everything. Once per Scene, you may ask for information about the past or a specific subject or place, which is only available to you due to your long history. The Storyteller will provide relevant and useful details. Once per Scene, you may also change the above Descriptor associated with this Gift to one that represents a skill you have conjured to your immortal mind. This new Descriptor is yours until the end of the Scene, and you receive 1 Additional Success the first time you use it for a Check.

gifts.name: The Servant
gifts.description: Once per Scene, as an additional action, you can grant 1 Additional Success to an ally’s action if you can narratively support them. You can also always spend your Soma to pay the activation cost of your allies’ Gifts.

darkEgo.name: Dark Ego - The Immortal
darkEgo.description: When you suffer 1 Wound, you can immediately spend 1 Soma to remain conscious, allowing you to suffer many Wounds without dying. You are in full control of your body, even parts that have been cut off. You can see through a torn eye or continue to use your severed hand. At the end of the Scene in which you activated your Dark Ego, you recover all Wounds suffered except the first one. Your body regenerates and severed parts reattach in a horrific spectacle.
darkEgo.trigger: Use your indifference to pain or death to your advantage, revealing your true nature for anyone to see.

actors.equipment: Poor clothes / a worn out sickle (reminder of times past) / a small bag with precious items collected during adventures / a key that opens one of many secret refuges / a papal ring as a symbol of indenture to the Church / a little toy given by someone helped with the first good deed.

actors.name: the Sea Explorer
actors.story: I am a traveler, and, over the years, I have visited every location known to man. Being a traveling merchant has allowed me to easily hide my talents as a witch from prying eyes. Year after year, I have accumulated all kinds of magical and mundane wealth. But the Order found me and forced me to sign the most one-sided contract of my entire career as a trader. Now I must put my skills and my charisma at the service of the Order, trying to earn as much as possible to redeem the enormous debt that they have made me incur through deceit.
descriptors: I am a sea witch, and as such, I have the power to shape water and move it at will. I hate enclosed places, cut off from the presence of my beloved sea.

Nobody knows my true form, which I hide under an appearance of eternal youth. I can change shape to some extent, while still remaining in human form. I am hopelessly attracted to all forms of beauty and I often get lost in contemplating it.
I have a massive collection of magical relics and treasures. I am very stingy with my collection and constantly seeking to add to my wealth so I can redeem my freedom.

gifts.name: Sea Magic
gifts.description: You can unleash your witch powers and control seawater, manipulating it as if it were solid. You can use it as a weapon or as an object to support your actions, giving it the consistency of a whip that can reach up to thirty feet. When you act, you can take a second supporting action, such as picking up something, moving someone you want to defend, or hindering an enemy’s movement thanks to the water you manipulate. You can also use this Gift with fresh water, but you will need to spend 1 Soma to do so.

gifts.name: Mutable Appearance
gifts.description: Once per Scene you can change your appearance. Create a Descriptor that represents your new appearance. Nobody can pierce your deception, except through magical means or Gifts that allow one to discover the truth. In addition, you may spend 1 Soma to take the specific appearance of a person you have already met, mimicking their voice and manners as well. You can keep your new appearance until the Scene is over.

darkEgo.name: Dark Ego - Treasures of the Sea
darkEgo.description: At the beginning of the Scenario, you receive 2 Treasure Tokens. When you show off your Treasures, spend 1 Treasure Token and 1 Soma, and create a Descriptor that represents it such as Wolf-Slaying Dagger or Lens of Truth. Receive 1 Additional Success for any Check in which your Treasure may be helpful. Alternatively, spend 1 Token to draw a Potion from your pouch to give to someone. Create a Descriptor to represent its magical effect such as Seeing in the dark or Extraordinary strength. Whoever drinks it will be granted the Descriptor you created for 1 Scene, plus 1 Additional Success on the first action in which they use the advantage given by the potion. When you obtain a new treasure or close a favorable deal, you receive 1 Treasure Token.
darkEgo.trigger: Turn a request for help or a conversation into a negotiation, making it clear how amazing your treasures are.

actors.equipment: Exotic and colorful dresses / a large bag full of treasures / a travel bag / rings and fine jewelry made out of seashells / a vial of sea water / cosmetics and perfumes.

actors.name: Niklaus von Krampus
actors.story: I am a devoted clergyman who has always dedicated his life to helping others. Over the years I have become a talented exorcist and this vocation of mine led me to the remote village of Borgo Maleanime. There, I fought a particularly insidious demon, who concealed itself among the ranks of a gang of young thugs who merely pretended to be demons to scare people. It was a tough fight, but I finally got the better of the fiend. Or so I thought. Something in the exorcism did not go as expected and now the demon dwells inside me, sowing fear and pain whenever it re-emerges. The Order welcomed me into its ranks as an exorcist and I gladly accepted this role, with the hope that the missions entrusted to me would allow me to find a way to rid myself, once and for all, of that which hides within me.
descriptors: I am a skilled exorcist. I know how to identify and fight evil through prayer and the sacred arts. Despite what I am, I hate holy places and manifestations of faith and religion, as they cause the demon inside me to stir.

I am good at understanding people and helping them. Now, thanks to the demon that dwells in me, I can even perceive the dark side of people. Every so often, however, the demon takes over, making me behave strangely in front of ordinary people.
The demon in me grants me its power, allowing me to act with savage strength and speed. It is not easy to contain this ferocity and, often, I end up hurting or destroying things I did not wish to.

gifts.name: Exorcist
gifts.description: When you face a clearly supernatural being, you gain 1 Additional Success on all Checks. You can also invoke sacred rites and prayers to disturb the evil you face. If a subject, artifact, or supernatural manifestation uses a Gift that you know of or have already seen in action, you can spend 1 Soma to prevent its use. Each time you activate this Gift, roll 1 die. If you roll a 5 or a 6, you gain 1 Devil Token.

gifts.name: The Inner Demon
gifts.description: Once per Scene, you can release the inner demon, whether that’d be yours or someone else’s. In your case, create a Descriptor that represents an emotion that includes the word Anger, Envy, or Wickedness. You receive 2 Additional Successes the first time you use this Descriptor for a Position Check. If you unleash someone else’s inner demon, the Storyteller will create a Descriptor for them that showcases their hidden, dark side. When using this Gift on particularly powerful individuals, the Storyteller may request a Position Check from you to succeed. Each time you use this Gift, you receive 1 Devil Token.

darkEgo.name: Dark Ego - The Demon Revealed
darkEgo.description: While generally retaining control, every now and then you have to allow the demon to manifest and unleash its anger. Create a Descriptor that represents your demonic form and that includes at least one of these words: Monstrous, Fierce, Beastly. Your physical abilities go far beyond those of a mere mortal, but you will behave like a devil, enjoying the evil and fear you inspire. When you act using this special Descriptor, you gain 1 Additional Success. You can spend 1 Devil Token to inflict 1 additional Wound or to spend as Soma for a Check. Once per Scenario, the Storyteller can spend 1 Devil Token to activate this Gift against your will.
darkEgo.trigger: Give free rein to your demonic side or listen to the sound of bells or cowbells for at least one minute.

actors.equipment: An old cassock worn from many travels / exorcism vestments and tools / a shepherd’s curved staff of wood and iron to beat the devil with / an old pouch containing mysterious items taken while the demon is in control / precious small relics received as offerings / an old, time-worn bible.

actors.name: George the Holy Dragon Slayer
actors.story: I am the most skilled and trusted agent of the Papacy and as such, it is my responsibility to make sure that the fight against darkness never falters. As a child, I fell into a river and almost drowned, but was saved by a creature that I later discovered was a dragon. When I grew up, I took holy vows and joined the Church. In doing so, I discovered that what I believed to be my savior was actually a creature of darkness, ready to steal my soul. I vowed to fight the darkness, suppressing the feeling of gratitude toward the dragon that saved me, which has always plagued me. Such weakness represents a crack through which evil could slither in. No mercy for monsters, no forgiveness for those who would join and serve the forces of evil.
descriptors: I have dedicated my life to slaying monsters and aberrations, honing my body and my skill for that purpose. My strict discipline makes me rarely inclined to forgive the mistakes of others.
I have vowed to eradicate all evil from this world and nothing can escape my inquisitive gaze. I hate all secrets, for I know that the seed of evil may grow within anyone.
I am a saint in the eyes of ordinary people and no door remains closed for me. My word is that of the Church itself. What I say is not to be questioned.

gifts.name: The Dragon Slayer
gifts.description: You’re skilled at slaying monsters and demonic creatures in the name of faith. You start each Scenario with 1 Fervor Token. When facing an enemy that is obviously monstrous, if you get a successful Outcome on a Position Check, you can spend 1 Fervor Token to inflict 1 additional Wound. When such an enemy attempts to overwhelm you using one of their Gifts, you can spend 1 Fervor Token to receive 2 Additional Successes to your Defense Check. When you suffer 1 Wound, you receive 1 Fervor Token.

gifts.name: Agent of the Papacy
gifts.description: When you speak to a crowd you can infuse their hearts with the light of faith. Spend 1 Fervor Token and you can create a Descriptor that represents a feeling of faith, anger, and a desire for justice against evil. Alternatively, create a Descriptor that represents trust and submission in such faith. The crowd will act accordingly for the rest of the Scene, but particularly powerful NPCs may be immune to your words. Receive 1 Additional Success on any Check you make using the sentiment you inspired. When you publicly expose evil, you receive 1 Fervor Token.

darkEgo.name: Dark Ego - The Saint
darkEgo.description: When you channel sacred divine power, everyone bows their heads. Ordinary people will show you reverence, while weaker enemy NPCs (at the Storyteller’s discretion) won’t target you unless you’re the only available option, nor will they try to get in your way. In your presence, anyone possessing powers linked to the supernatural lowers their Opposition Level by 1. Your holy aura emits an intense light that can illuminate the whole area around you at your will.
darkEgo.trigger: Invoke holy divine power by reproaching all sinners and providing an example of purity and righteousness.

actors.equipment: Sacred armor / a sword and a spear blessed by the Pope himself / my proud war stallion / a cross engraved with the Keys of Saint Peter (universal symbol of power) / Aldebrand the faithful squire / papal papers and seals / a cloak of fine workmanship.

actors.name: Sun Wukong the Amazing Monkey
actors.story: I have no memory of my life before my captivity, although I often dream of the forests and snow-capped peaks of my beloved China. I grew up as a circus animal at London’s Royal Circus but, deep within I carry the conviction that I am destined for something else. I rebelled by killing all my captors, fleeing across a vast and labyrinthine city. When the Order reached me, I thought it was the end, but the Hunters took me with them as their guardian and defender. The more I live as a Hunter, the closer I draw to transcendence. Now I am aware that, someday, I will discover who I really am.
descriptors: I am a skilled guardian. My body is strong and hardened, my senses sharp and alert. Years of captivity have made me submissive, and I struggle not to follow every order I am given.
I am stronger and faster than any human and I am a highly skilled fighter. I don’t shy away from a challenge because I always believe I can win.

My essence is magical, and this makes me resistant to enchantments that might snare stupid humans. My spiritual presence is imposing, and I struggle to hide what I am, especially in the eyes of those accustomed to magic.

gifts.name: Guardian Disciple
gifts.description: You can intercept a danger before it overwhelms your ally. You may spend 1 Soma to get between an ally and a danger by standing in their place. Receive 1 Additional Success to any Defense Check you have to perform doing so. Once per Scenario, you can ignore 1 Wound you suffer.

gifts.name: Monkey King
gifts.description:
You are able to perform athletic feats unthinkable to a mere mortal. You may spend 1 Soma and choose an effect:
1. You can jump incredibly far, up to thirty feet. You can bring another person with you by carrying them on your shoulders. You also ignore any damage related to a fall.
2. Use your tail to manipulate an object and perform an additional action.
3. Ignore any physical impediments to movement by using your impressive skills.

darkEgo.name: Dark Ego - Descendant of the Awakening of the Void and the Emptiness
darkEgo.description: When you release your true power, your body emits a divine light and no one can stop you. Take 1 Wound to get 2 Additional Successes to any physical Checks you have to perform. For the rest of the Scene spells have little effect on you and you get 2 Additional Successes to any Defense Check you make to protect yourself from arcane effects. When you deal a hit to someone, you can spend 1 Soma to inflict 1 additional Wound. The effects of this Gift cease if you behave in a composed and obedient manner, as your role as guardian dictates.
darkEgo.trigger: Act with passion and strength, showing everyone the incredible power that lies within your body.

actors.equipment: A circus stick with three extendable segments / old and worn circus clothes / a golden diadem so tight on my forehead that it cannot be removed / a sheet with the drawing of a Chinese landscape — gift from a child who once watched one of my shows.

actors.name: Verdoux Bluebeard
actors.story: I am a French aristocrat, called upon by my sovereign to manage the most devious and disreputable matters. I have lived an unconventional life, between accomplishing impossible tasks and keeping unspeakable secrets. It has opened my eyes to the world beyond the prosaic limits to which most are accustomed. In an effort to escape my adventurous life, I have more than once tried to start a family. However, my efforts have always ended in ruin, a price I must pay for the secrets I keep. I have lost six lovers, each killed by enemies and dangers that I naively hoped I could exclude from my life. That is why I volunteered for the Order, took an oath to weed out the darkness in this world, and sought revenge for the lives that were stolen from me.
descriptors: My specialty is problem solving and I have a talent for analyzing every situation, allowing me to find resources and discover clues. Managing danger requires calm and concentration, and so I hate acting precipitously.
I am an educated man who has studied the arts and sciences. I use this knowledge to uncover truths and reveal mysteries. I hate secrets, but only when I don’t know them.

Under the facade of a respectable man hides a skilled, unscrupulous problem-solver. I know how to kill and how to act with decisiveness. Everyone has done something they are not proud of and I can’t stand seeing the hypocrites who pretend as if they are morally superior to others.

gifts.name: Problem Solver
gifts.description: If you’ve seen it once, you can do it yourself even better. You may spend 1 Soma to replicate the effect of a Gift from a Hunter or NPC you witnessed during the Scenario. Particular Gifts may still be off limits or only yield a part of their effect at the Storyteller’s discretion. You cannot replicate more than one Gift at a time. Once per Scene, you may ask the Storyteller to reveal to you a Gift of an NPC that you had time to study.

gifts.name: The Key to Each Door
gifts.description:
Once per Scene, you can use one of the magic keys you own. Choose an effect:
1. Open a closed door, no matter how many locks or defenses it has.
2. If a subject touches your key, discover the strongest feeling they are experiencing.
3. Close and lock a door so that no conventional methods will be able to open it.
4. If you put your key in the mouth of a dead person you will see some of their memories. The Storyteller will describe them to you, focusing on your areas of interest.

darkEgo.name: Dark Ego - The Unscrupulous Assassin
darkEgo.description: You may appear as a civilized gentleman, but appearances can be deceiving. When necessary, you will not hesitate to kill. If you eliminate an NPC by inflicting a final Wound, you can also immediately eliminate a second Minor NPC. When you successfully defend yourself from a violent action, you can immediately eliminate a Minor NPC in response. Either way, the target must be within range of your wrath. After inflicting 1 Wound to someone, you can move freely as an additional action, allowing you to reach your true goal without anyone preventing you from doing so.
darkEgo.trigger: Reveal your dark side by injuring someone or acting aggressively despite your outwardly calm and staid appearance.

actors.equipment: Nobleman’s clothes / a long black cape / a large bunch of keys / a fine dueling blade / snuff of excellent quality / a few doses of deadly Aqua Tofana / a large amount of coins and precious trinkets / a heart-shaped locket hanging from a gold chain with the names of my lost loves engraved within.

actors.name: the Traveling Artist
actors.story: I am a traveling artist who has known fame and honor in my homeland, Japan. That prestige meant nothing, however, when I found true love with Akihiro, son of a powerful noble family. When they forbade him from seeing me, we fled together to the remote region of Ezo. Even there we were not beyond the reach of Akihiro’s family and they pursued us into the high, snow-capped mountains. We had escaped every assassin, but could not outwit the snowstorm that trapped us. I survived, but only because Akihiro sacrificed the warmth of his life to save mine. But the cold has left me changed. It has become part of me and now the only thing that can make me feel warm is the hot blood of others. After taking revenge on all those who took Akihiro from me, I fled far away, using my talent for art to gain prestige and the protection of wealthy western nobles. Now, in the service of the Order, I save others from suffering the injustice that I have experienced, by punishing selfishness and wickedness.
descriptors: I am a highly skilled artist. Music, dance, and painting hold no mysteries for me. My otherworldly charm captivates ordinary people, always drawing attention to me.
I cannot feel pain and my frail appearance hides surprising physical abilities. Blood is the only thing that can warm me and its smell alone makes me shiver.

My body is pure ice and, because of this, I can manipulate ice as I please. However, I hate to manifest my power because it is dangerous to those around me and, as an artist, my purpose is to make people smile.

gifts.name: Otherworldly Charm
gifts.description: When you perform or flaunt your talents, all eyes will be on you. Receive 1 Additional Success for each Position Check you make to attract attention or charm someone. If you get an Outcome with an Increment, you may declare that a subject who has seen you has fallen in love with you. The Storyteller will create a specific Agenda for them that leads them to seek your attention.

gifts.name: Blood-Hot
gifts.description: Once per Scene, you can consume a person’s blood when inflicting 1 non-fatal Wound. You recover 1 Wound, 1 Soma and receive some information about your victim such as a memory, an emotion or their heart’s desire. When you drink blood roll a die: if you roll a 1, you lose control and you will kill your victim by draining their blood, unless someone stops you.

darkEgo.name: Dark Ego - Ice-Cold
darkEgo.description: You have control over your body temperature and, consequently, you can freeze the environment or objects in your immediate vicinity. When you manipulate ice, choose an effect by creating a Descriptor that represents it such as: Frozen Door or Aura of Frost and spend 1 Soma to manifest it for the whole Scene. As an additional effect, your frost can inflict 1 Wound on those who interact with it or make what you freeze incredibly fragile or incredibly hard. Whoever exploits the effects of frost in their favor gains 1 Additional Success for their action. Your frost has no direct effect on living things.
darkEgo.trigger: Shed your disguise as a simple artist and reveal your true, bitterly cold form or react passionately when fear and intimidation are used for selfish reasons.

actors.equipment: A travel kimono / a stage kimono and theatrical effects / a small ice sphere that never melts / a butterfly-shaped hair clip (reminder of Akihiro) / a finely crafted shamisen / a pair of fine fans / several daggers hidden in the kimono.

actors.name: Cunning Machiavelli the Fox and Sly Bischeri the Cat
actors.note: Use Cunning's side at night and Sly's side during the day, following the source sheet. Spanish local sheet archived at systems/broken-tales/assets/source-pdfs/machiavelli-el-zorro-astuto-y-bischeri-el-gato-malicioso.pdf.
actors.story: We are two boys who survived and thrived on the street through trickery and deceit. Unfortunately, we made a terrible mistake by choosing a weird old lady as a mark. She turned out to be a goddamn witch. The witch cursed us… And from that day on, every twelve hours, one becomes a Fox and the other a Cat. Bound by this spell, we found a way to make a lot of money, deceiving stupid nobles and rich merchants. The Order has noticed us and taken us under its wing, with the promise of breaking the curse that afflicts us.
descriptors: Cunning's Descriptor: I have a natural talent for telling lies, which the Order often uses to its advantage. Despite my origins, I know a great deal about many things because lying requires planning and preparation.
Sly's Descriptor: A life on the road has taught me to be a skilled thief. Everyone for themselves is my motto.

Common Descriptor: I will stop at nothing to get what I want, and it only takes me a few seconds to evaluate what is happening and find the right way to take advantage of it. I hate acting alone because there's no one to take the blame.

Like it or not, we are bound by magic. We can share thoughts, each see what the other sees, and thanks to this we can work together to cheat others. Whoever is in animal form hates not being able to communicate and often annoys the other out of spite.

gifts.name: Believe in Miracles (Cunning)
gifts.description: Once per Scene, you can tell everyone something that will be accepted without question until the lie is uncovered. The deception becomes obvious at the end of the Scene or once exposed. Gain +1 Success on any Check where you exploit the lie.

gifts.name: Rogue (Sly)
gifts.description: By pretending to be weak during a Scene, NPCs will overlook you unless you acted against them. By spending 1 Soma, you can flee any Scene involving a crowd.

gifts.name: Partner in Crime (Common)
gifts.description: Once per Scene, when an ally acts with your support, they receive +1 Additional Success. Additionally, if an ally achieves an Outcome with an Increment, you may immediately take an extra action.

darkEgo.name: Dark Ego - The Fox and the Cat
darkEgo.description: You and your partner share Soma and Wounds. The human form can spend 1 Soma to use the Gift of the animal form. Once per Scene, if your partner helps you, you gain +2 Additional Successes on a Position Check.
darkEgo.trigger: Trick or deceive someone, taking advantage of your partner's support.

actors.equipment:
Night (Cunning): Comfortable and light clothes, hidden small knives, counterfeit cards and stamps, fake coins and jewelry / a volume of the Biblioteca Universale Sacro-Profana Encyclopedia.

Day (Sly): Worn-out clothes, sharp long knife / old stick to pretend to be blind, torn purse with a hole, sack full of stolen junk.

actors.name: Alice of Other Worlds
actors.story:
I am a young doctor who has dedicated her whole life to the treatment of mental illnesses. I understand 
them, for I am suffering from one as well, and only those who burned themselves while playing with 
fire can understand its dangers. After a dark period during which I managed a sanatorium, the Order 
stripped me of all academic honors and degrees, reducing me to the status of a criminal. But it didn’t 
take long for them to understand the extent of my studies and the magnitude of my abilities. After 
possessing the Pope himself, I struck a deal with the Order. They will allow me to continue my studies, 
but I may only study the creatures they fight. And perhaps, through the distorted minds of the Broken 
Tales, I can prove that the worlds I visited as a child are real and not the ramblings of a mad mind.
descriptors:
I am a skilled physician and psychiatrist, and 
diagnosing illnesses is simple. My work has made me 
particularly cold and detached.

Cheshire, my faithful trained lynx, is the most 
trustworthy of companions – a shadow keeping 
me safe from threats. Cheshire’s attachment is an 
obsession and she may even threaten those who don’t 
want to hurt me.

Alice of
Other Worlds
As a child I traveled to other worlds and my mind can perceive and see 
things beyond common perception. Memories of my childhood haunt me, 
and I often get lost in visions of the past.

gifts.name: Physician
gifts.description:
Once per Scenario, when you take the 
time to treat an injury, you may heal 1 Wound suffered 
by one of your patients, also bringing them back from 
apparent death or unconsciousness. Y ou may spend 1 
Soma to reassure and calm someone who is frightened or 
experiencing any negative feeling. If you do, you receive 
1 Additional Success to any Check involving interactions 
with that patient for the remaining of the Scenario.

gifts.name: Cheshire the Lynx
gifts.description:
Cheshire is an NPC fully 
under your control, with the following profile:
OL Medium 5 – (2 Wounds) 
Descriptor: I am a big, short-tempered wild lynx and I only 
live to serve Alice.
Gift - Two Souls: Y ou share your soul with Cheshire, and 
you can see and feel through her senses. Y ou can spend 
1 Soma to make Cheshire immaterial for an action and 
allow her to cross any obstacle.

darkEgo.name: Dark Ego - Alice of Other Worlds
darkEgo.description:
As an action, you may spend 
1 Soma to try to possess the body of a person or animal that is looking into 
your eyes. Particularly powerful individuals may require a Position Check for 
you to succeed. Y ou can act through the body you possess and continue to use 
your Gifts and Descriptors, but you receive an additional Descriptor created 
by the Storyteller and representing the abilities of the body you are possessing. 
The possession ends at the end of the Scene, when the possessed body suffers 1 
Wound, or you decide to return to your body of your own volition. While you 
control someone else’s body, your original body is inert and at the mercy of the 
world. Y ou cannot possess Broken Tales or supernatural creatures. Y our mind is 
not easy to control, so you gain 1 Additional Success for Defense Checks against 
any kind of mind control and magic.
darkEgo.trigger:
You notice a detail that does not match what you consider normal.
XP
Soma
 5

actors.equipment:
A valuable doctor’s coat / Books about the human psyche / 
A watch, a gift from someone I met on my travels / A lucky 
rabbit’s foot / A set of sharp scalpels / A doctor’s bag / A deck 
of cards which is missing the queen of hearts.

actors.name: Beauty and her Beast
actors.story:
I am Bellina Cantalupo, but everyone calls me Bella. I was once a servant to the bride of the monstrous Dionysus 
Gonsalva. I played my cards well, charmed the nobleman, and rose to power. Unfortunately, the Order got in the 
way and sabotaged everything I had built. As a punishment, I was magically bound to Dionysus and now our 
souls are intertwined. I feel his pain and his beastly instincts. Dionysus perceives, in turn, my disgust for him, 
but it doesn’t affect the mad love he feels for me. I serve the Order in the hope of gaining its grace and being 
released from this punishment. But, deep down in my heart, I still long for the power that I was denied being born 
a peasant, but that I know I deserve.
descriptors:
Dionysus follows me and protects me like a faithful beast, 
and responds to all my commands. As useful as this is, I feel 
disgusted every time he comes near me.

I am charismatic and affable. My innate air of superiority 
fascinates simple people. I love having all my eyes on me.

I am linked to Dionysus and we share pain and perceptions. He will 
always know where I am and vice versa. For me, that’s the most 
humiliating part of the curse.

gifts.name: The Beast
gifts.description:
Dionysus is an NPC fully under your control, 
with the following profile:
OL Medium 5 – (Wounds: as Bella’s current value) 
Descriptor: I am a powerful and feral beastman. Only Bella’s scent 
keeps me under control.
Gift - Monstrous: If he intends to kill someone, Dionysus may 
act twice in each Exchange. Once per Scene, Dionysus can break 
or lift even a large object with extreme ease. 
During Scenes, you decide how Dionysus acts. Any Wound one 
of you suffers also applies to the other. When Dionysus is within 
a few steps, you receive 1 Penalty to each Check due to the strong 
disgust you feel for him.

gifts.name: The Beauty
gifts.description:
Once per Scene, when you meet a new subject, 
you may spend 1 Soma and declare that you have met them in the 
past and that you made some kind of deal with them. Create, in 
agreement with the Storyteller, an Agenda for them representing 
the deal. If you take the time to talk to someone, the Storyteller 
must reveal a clue about their current Agenda or a drawback of 
one of their Descriptors. When someone shows a strong interest 
in you, Dionysus, if present, loses the use of the Monstrous Gift 
because of the strong jealousy and shame he feels for himself.

darkEgo.name: Dark Ego - Beasts in Body and Soul
darkEgo.description:
When you reveal your 
true nature everyone is horrified. One is a beast in body, while the other 
is a beast in her soul. Y ou receive 3 Savagery Tokens that you can spend 
during the Scene to: 
1. Inflict 1 additional Wound, if Dionysus spends an action to help you in 
the attack. The Wound will be a strikingly bloody gash.
2. Have a minor NPC lose their action as they are intimidated, having 
witnessed the fury of Dionysus.
3. If Dionysus is not present in the Scene, he can appear immediately 
(possibly tearing a new opening in the environment, demolishing any 
possible obstacle) to support you. 
4. Perform a second action in the Exchange, if Dionysus spends one of his 
to open the way for you.
darkEgo.trigger:
Unleash the feral power of Dionysus, or humiliate or betray 
someone, revealing your true nature.

actors.equipment:
A leather whip and metal needles / A noble dress / Fine 
dresses and jewelry / A rose that never fades / A bag 
with dried meat with which to keep Dionysus’ hunger at 
bay / Soaps and feminine perfumes / A poisoned stiletto 
that I keep hidden for any eventuality.

actors.name: Bloodwhite
descriptors:
I am a mutant and can alter my body as I wish. The Order uses 
my unique abilities to support other Hunters. When it changes, 
my body emits a particular hormone that arouses those close 
to me.

My touch is capable of mutating other beings with devastating 
results. The flesh deforms before it explodes. When I am in the 
grip of strong emotions, I lose control of my power and I am 
afraid to touch the people I care about.

I am a good girl and believe in the power of love and justice. My 
pure gaze reaches the hearts of the people close to me. I try to 
avoid those that look at me with disgust, believing me to be a 
monster.

gifts.name: Mutant
gifts.description:
Y ou start the Scenario with 3 Mutation Tokens. 
Y ou may spend 1 Mutation Token to modify a part of your body, 
such as turning your arms into wings or your skin into a thick 
carapace. Create a Descriptor that represents the mutation. Y ou 
gain 1 Additional Success whenever you take advantage of your 
mutation. Whenever you change shape, the Storyteller can decide 
that the hormone emitted by your body bewilders the mind of an 
NPC nearby, creating a specific Agenda for them that leads them 
to seek you in some way. Y our mutations remain until the end of 
the Scene. Once per Scenario, the Storyteller can declare that this 
Gift is activated without you realizing it and give you 1 Mutation 
Token.

gifts.name: Mutagenic Touch
gifts.description:
Y ou can inflict 1 Wound to a living 
being with the touch of your hand. If you kill the target this way, 
it will explode in a gruesome way, scaring everyone present. The 
most impressionable NPCs, at the Storyteller’s discretion, will 
then try to avoid any confrontation with you. When you achieve 
an Outcome with an Increment with your touch and kill someone, 
your body assimilates part of the exploded flesh, and you may 
recover 1 Mutation Token or 1 Soma.

darkEgo.name: Dark Ego - Pure Innocence
darkEgo.description:
When you appeal to the 
purity of your heart, even the foulest spell is broken. When you 
activate your Dark Ego during a Scene, you become immune to 
any effect of fear or mind control, and all subjects you consider evil 
lower their Opposition Level by 1 in your presence. Y ou can spend 1 
Mutation Token to give 1 Additional Success to the first action of all 
allies who admire you for who you are.
darkEgo.trigger:
Open your heart and appeal to the goodness of those close to 
you, revealing who you are, or sacrifice something of yourself for others.
XP
Soma
 5

actors.equipment:
A precious dress / A swallow-shaped hair clip, a 
gift from my mother / An old gun, a gift from a 
group of seven mercenaries who defended me for 
a long time / The coat of arms of my noble family 
/ A few small animals from the woods that follow 
me, attracted by my smell.

actors.name: Wound. Carlo the LivingPuppet
descriptors:
My life is animated by the magic of lies, and for this reason 
I am skilled at recognizing and using both falsehoods and 
magic. Even if admitting it is hurtful, my own life is a lie and 
I move only because I pretend to be a real child.

I want to prove that I am a good boy, and that is why I strive 
to perform every task that is assigned to me. I naively tend to 
trust adults blindly, even if I just met them.

gifts.name: Lies
gifts.description:
When you tell a lie, you can temporarily make it a 
reality. Create a Descriptor that represents your lie and concerns 
something about you that you pride yourself on, such as: I have the 
strength of five men, or I can fly through the air. The Descriptor 
remains throughout the Scene, and you gain 1 Additional Success 
the first time you use it for an action. Each time you make use of this 
Gift you receive 1 Lie Token. Y our nose will grow in proportion 
to the amount of Lie Tokens you have. During the Scenario the 
Storyteller can spend 1 Lie Token to give you 1 Penalty on a Check, 
describing how your clumsy puppet body prevents you from 
performing at your best. With every Lie Token spent, your nose 
shrinks closer back to normal.

gifts.name: Always in the Middle of Trouble
gifts.description:
Once per Scene, 
when you face a danger or problem arising from a previous choice 
you have made, you recover 1 Soma and get 2 XP . When you do 
what an NPC asks and trust them without asking questions, you 
can discard 1 Lie Token.

darkEgo.name: Dark Ego - Soulless Puppet
darkEgo.description:
Y our body is made of wood and 
so you ignore any penalty derived from dangers that would affect a living 
being. Y ou receive 1 Additional Success to all your Defense Checks. Y ou 
can communicate with other puppets or toys who can tell you something 
at the Storyteller’s discretion. If you stay still, you will pass as a common 
puppet in the eyes of those who see you and you cannot be discovered 
except with special skills or magic.
darkEgo.trigger:
Make obvious use of the wooden properties of your body to perform 
an action, or have your nose grow dramatically (i.e. when you accumulate 
the third Lie Token), proving to everyone that you are not human.

actors.equipment:
A school coat / An old textbook / A map to the famous 
Field of Miracles / A small bag with some junk taken 
from the stomach of a fish / A miraculous medicine, 
gift of a Fairy.

actors.name: Hatta Carter
descriptors:
I am obsessed with time and when I can plan an action out, I can 
complete it half the time a normal person would need. Sometimes 
I lose focus on what I am doing, using twice as much time to 
complete the simplest actions.

I am a good toymaker and the small automata I build can 
perform the most varied tasks. All my creations have a touch 
of my madness and sometimes they don’t work exactly as they 
should.

gifts.name: Time Watches
gifts.description:
When you want to use time to your 
advantage, you can twist the stem on one of your watches and choose 
from the following. 
1. Slow the World Down: Receive 1 Additional Success to your 
next Position Check.
2. Speed up the Hatter: Y ou can act immediately (unless you 
have already done so during the Exchange) by interrupting anyone’s 
action, regardless of what else might be happening in the narrative. 
When you use your watches, you gain 1 Time Token. During the 
Scenario, the Storyteller can spend 1 Time Token to freeze you a few 
seconds in time and give you 2 Penalties to a Defense Check. If you 
take an Interlude and drink some good tea, you can discard all the 
Time Tokens you have accumulated.

gifts.name: Playmates
gifts.description:
Y ou own three automated dolls, The Little 
Hatter, The Hare, and The Dormouse. Each automaton can perform 
small tasks, such as picking up and carrying items or delivering a 
message. Each doll has a special ability.
The Little Hatter can explode, inflicting 1 Wound to everyone 
within ten feet of it. 
The Hare can always find a way, even through narrow places or 
closed doors. 
The Dormouse can fall asleep and deactivate to discard 1 Time 
Token. 
During Interludes, repair all automata.

darkEgo.name: Dark Ego - Mad like a Hatter
darkEgo.description:
When you give free rein to 
your madness, reality bends itself to prove you right. Declare something 
crazy such as That door leads to the opposite side of town, or This pair 
of glasses allows you to see ghosts and create a Descriptor. Y our madness 
must always concern an object and its crazy use. Y ou cannot directly affect 
or interact with living beings. Suffer 1 Wound caused by the fatigue of 
turning your madness into reality. Y our madness lasts throughout the 
Scene. If at least one subject is amazed by what you do with your madness, 
you gain 1 Soma.
darkEgo.trigger:
Behave and talk like a crazy person, not worrying about the 
reactions of those around you.

actors.equipment:
A valuable and improbably tall top hat / Evening 
clothes / Watchmaker’s shirts and glasses / A 
complete set of over twenty watches / My precious 
toys / A modified gun that can shoot multifunction 
bullets / A fancy tea set.

actors.name: The Knight with a Hundred Heads
descriptors:
I am a swordsman and a Hussar knight with finely honed 
combat skills. Ordog is more than a common horse and he 
often saved me with his magic. Sometimes I wonder who the 
real Hunter of the Order is.

I am a tenacious defender and in my previous life, I always 
stood my ground, never retreating. The memory of my loved 
ones makes me melancholic and I cannot forgive those who 
hurt families.

gifts.name: Ordog the Trusty Horse
gifts.description:
Ordog is a strange horseshaped entity. He can speak and is uncannily smart, but he is very 
sarcastic and capricious. Ordog will always know how to find you 
and will overcome all obstacles to reach you. When you ask for his 
help, Ordog will manifest his magical power and the Storyteller 
will create a Descriptor that will allow him to do incredible things, 
such as fly or pass through the walls. The Storyteller has full 
control of Ordog’s will and whims, so expect to have to promise 
him something or convince him of your reasons.

gifts.name: The Bridge
gifts.description:
When you protect a place or honor an oath 
you have taken, nothing can overwhelm you. Once per Scene, you 
may declare an oath in which you swear to defend something and 
gain 3 Oath Tokens. As long as you act to fulfill your oath, you can 
spend 1 Token to:
1. Resist being separated from what you are defending.
2. Gain 1 Additional Success for a Defense Check.
3. Inflict 1 additional Wound to an enemy, but only if this allows 
you to eliminate them. If you do, you must decapitate them. 
If you break your oath, the magic that animates you weakens and 
the Storyteller gains 1 Sleep Token that they can spend at any time 
to have you automatically fail a Check.
The Knight with 
a Hundred
Heads

darkEgo.name: Dark Ego - The Headless Knight
darkEgo.description:
Y ou are an immortal 
vengeful spirit. When you suffer your last Wound, you dissolve into 
thin air to return at the beginning of the next Scene having recovered 2

actors.equipment:
A worn and colorful military uniform / My trusty 
dueling saber / A pair of finely made guns / A large 
tricorn hat covering my head / A pocket watch / A 
braid of hair which belonged to the one I loved / A 
letter from a comrade fallen in battle / A large scarf 
with which to wrap my face and hide my missing 
head.

actors.name: Iskra the Young Wolf
actors.story:
After another year of education and training, I finally found in the Order my new pack and made the 
Hunters my trusted hunting companions. I serve the Order with strength and dedication, happy to do 
everything the alpha Hunter asks of me.
descriptors:
When I am calm, I still look like a small and helpless child 
and, thanks to this, adults tend to underestimate me. I struggle to 
behave like a normal child, but I can’t keep my wolfish side leashed 
forever.

I perform my best when I’m cooperating with my hunting 
companions. I quickly learn the strengths and weaknesses of the 
pack. I follow every order of anyone I consider more important 
than me within the pack, without hesitation or remorse.

Iskra the
 Young
Wolf I am a wolf child and I defend myself with fangs and claws. My 
sense of smell is infallible. I’m young and I know little about the 
world, so I am easily intimidated when I face something I don’t 
know.

gifts.name: The Red Hood
gifts.description:
Y ou can spend 1 Soma to look exactly like 
a common child. Create a Descriptor that contains one of the words 
Pretty, Small, or Sweet. As long as you maintain your disguise, no 
adult will notice you or consider you a potential danger. Receive 2 
Additional Successes to the first action you take when you decide to 
drop your disguise and reveal who you are.

gifts.name: Pack
gifts.description:
When you coordinate and act with one or more of your 
teammates against a common threat, you both get 1 Additional Success 
for your Position Check. At the end of the Scene, if you have resolved 
a significant issue thanks to the collaboration with your companions, 
you recover 1 Soma.
Iwas abandoned by my mother in a large forest and survived by joining a pack of werewolves. After 
a year of honing my predatory skills, I tracked down the woman I once called “Mother” and sank 
my fangs into her throat. My pack was dismantled by a group of Hunters and the Order captured me.

darkEgo.name: Dark Ego - The Young Wolf
darkEgo.description:
Unleash your feral side, ready to bite anyone who opposes your pack. If you get an Outcome with an 
Increment on a Position Check, you can spend the Increment to take an 
additional action immediately. Y ou can also inflict 1 Wound on yourself 
to perform an additional action after your normal action. Y ou can’t 
perform more than 3 actions per Exchange. Y ou may spend 1 Soma 
to memorize the smell of a person you are interacting with. Y ou will 
always recognize them and it will be easy for you to follow their tracks 
even after a long time.
darkEgo.trigger:
Give free rein to your feral side or fulfill a task for your pack with your wolf skills.
XP
Soma
 6

actors.equipment:
A red cape of fine workmanship, embroidered with the 
coat of arms of the Order / A wolf mask carved in wood 
/ A broken clay doll, a memento of one of my few happy 
memories of my mother / A fang from the leader of my 
old pack / A rag doll depicting a well-dressed girl, a gift 
from my beloved grandmother.

actors.name: The Gang of three Pigs
actors.story:
We are three brothers who renounced their names to become emissaries of the God Under the Mine. We 
were a group of anarchists and rebels, but the Order captured us, forcing us to become Hunters. We carry with 
us the last piece of the God Under the Mine, an ancient and powerful creature. We keep the remains of the God a 
secret so that the Order won’t get their grubby hands on it. By feeding on it, our bodies can regenerate and even 
return from death, effectively making our gang immortal.
descriptors:
We are a gang and we use numerical superiority 
to overcome our human limitations. Our faces 
are always covered by a pig’s head mask, 
intimidating ordinary people.

Thanks to the flesh of the God Under the Mine, 
our body is able to regenerate. We do not fear 
pain or disease. Preserving the God’s meat is an 
obsession for us, and is more important than 
anything else.

We are capable builders and there is no building that we cannot fortify or infiltrate. We 
are very protective of what we think is ours.

gifts.name: Gang
gifts.description:
Y ou can act as three independent 
characters using all the same Descriptors, Gifts and 
Soma. Each gang member has 1 single Wound, for a 
total of 3. Each of you is skilled at something.
The eldest gains 1 Additional Success in actions 
involving repairing or tampering with the 
environment. 
The middle brother gains 1 Additional Success in 
actions to construct or tamper with objects.
The youngest gains 1 Additional Success in actions 
not related to any kind of obligation or duty towards 
the gang or the current mission.

gifts.name: Eating the Divine
gifts.description:
By eating the flesh, 
you can regenerate your bodies and even return 
from death. At the end of each Scene, each member 
recovers their Wound as long as at least one of the 
Brothers is still alive to activate the power of this Gift. 
Once per Scenario, one of you can spend 1 Soma to 
heal immediately from 1 Wound and come back to 
life instantly.

darkEgo.name: Dark Ego - Our Home
darkEgo.description:
When you arrive in a new location, you can take the 
time to examine, alter, and repair it. Y ou may use one of the following options for each 
present gang member.
1. Escape route: Detail a Descriptor that represents an escape route that only you 
may open.
2. Trap: Detail a Descriptor that describes how your trap activates and hurts intruders. 
Those who enter the perimeter will trigger it, suffering 1 Wound. Skilled and attentive 
individuals may require a Position Check to fall into your trap.
3. Improvement: Create a Descriptor that represents an improvement you make to 
the environment. Y ou get 1 Additional Success when you make use of your improvement 
during an action.
4. Alter: Detail a Descriptor that represents a new feature of the site that only you can 
activate.
darkEgo.trigger: Take time to work on a location and make it your own.

actors.equipment:
Pig’s head masks / Carpenter’s tool bags / Lots of bricks / 
Lots of wood / Lots of dried straw / Picks and hammers / 
Miners’ lanterns / Heavy leather work coats / A reinforced 
case containing the flesh of the God Under the Mine / 
Three keys.

actors.name: Morgana of the Lake
descriptors:
I have always had an intuitive understanding of destiny. 
Dreams and visions may come over me uncontrollably, giving 
me a glimpse of the right thread to follow. I often see things 
I’ d rather not and live with the pain of finding out what will 
happen in the future of someone I care about.

I am a skilled illusionist. Thanks to my power, I can conjure 
tricks of light and mirages. I am hopelessly attracted to mirrors 
and sleights of hand.

gifts.name: Weaver of Destiny
gifts.description:
Once per Scene, you can give a goal 
to an ally, such as Defeat that enemy or Retrieve that item. As 
long as your ally acts to fulfill the destiny you have indicated to 
them, they get 1 Additional Success to all their actions. However, 
if at the end of the Scene you have not achieved your goal, you will 
both suffer 1 Wound due to the magical backlash of destiny. When 
faced with one or more choices, you can spend 1 Soma and ask the 
Universe to help you decide. Choose a Keyword such as enemy, 
danger, or something else and the Storyteller will tell you which 
of the possibilities in front of you is the most related to the word 
you have chosen.

gifts.name: Illusion
gifts.description:
Y ou may spend 1 Soma to create up to three 
illusions and move them as you like. Create a Descriptor that 
represents your illusions. Every illusion is a distortion of the 
visual field. Y ou may make them more believable by adding 1 
element, choosing from between sound, smell, or tactility. Y our 
illusions are realistic, but they will be exposed if closely examined. 
Alternatively, you may spend 1 Soma to create three illusory 
copies of yourself to confuse watchers. Y ou gain 3 Additional 
Successes for the first Defense Check you make. Y ou then subtract 
1 Additional Success (down to zero) for each additional Defense 
Check you must take.

darkEgo.name: Dark Ego - The Supreme Fairy
darkEgo.description:
Y ou can unleash your true 
fairy essence and alter reality itself. When you do this, you suffer 1 Wound 
and choose an effect:
1. Making the Unreal a Reality: One of your illusions becomes 
real. If necessary, the Storyteller must create an ad hoc profile.
2. Supreme Fairy: Y ou may replicate a Gift with a magical effect you 
have witnessed at least once during the Scenario, for the duration of the 
Scene.
3. Lady of Destiny: Y ou can change the fate of a Minor NPC by 
rewriting its Descriptor and Agenda. This may not affect particularly 
powerful NPCs or enemies, at the Storyteller’s discretion.
darkEgo.trigger:
Evoke your true potential when experiencing a strong emotion or 
when you find yourself in a magically charged location, and let yourself be 
flooded with power.

actors.equipment:
A practical, street artist’s dress / A silver headband, a gift 
from someone I have forgotten / A small diary where I 
transcribe my dreams / An ancient coin engraved with the 
word Camelot / Two wooden dolls I hold in my sleep, a witch 
and a warlock.

actors.name: OZena the Suffering
actors.story:
Even if sometimes the memories of my “past in the future” resurface, making me homesick... What if the Order 
is deceiving me as Henkle did? Am I always meant to be just a pawn in someone else’s game?
descriptors:
I trained to be an efficient fighter and assassin, taking 
advantage of the magical shoes I took from my first 
victim. The disease that afflicts me disfigures my face and I 
am ashamed of my condition.

I have been leading a band of followers for a long time and I 
know how a leader should behave. I’m good at imposing my 
will on others. Even though I am often offered loyalty, being 
a stranger far from my home in time and space makes it 
difficult to trust others.

I am a person out of her time and largely immune to those who use spells and 
magic. I have a natural talent for fighting those who use magic. I hate witches 
and sorcerers because, despite their power, they can’t heal me.

gifts.name: The Silver Shoes
gifts.description:
When you move, you can teleport 
for short distances, and this allows you to automatically elude 
any attempt to impede or prevent your movements. Y ou need to 
see where you intend to reappear. If you’re holding someone’s 
hand, you can spend 1 Soma to bring them with you. Once 
during the Scenario, you may make a longer trip, even of 
several miles, but only to a place that you have seen at least once 
before.

gifts.name: Experience of a Dark Journey
gifts.description:
Y ou have 
accomplished many missions with strange companions and 
have learned something from each of them. Y ou can invoke 
each of these effects once per Scenario.
1. Tough as Tin: Ignore 1 Wound you should suffer from 
physical damage. 
2. The Bravery of a Lion: Y ou gain 2 Additional Successes 
when you throw yourself against a great danger without caring 
about the consequences.
3. The Brain of a Genius Scarecrow: The Storyteller 
will provide you with useful information about a place, 
personality, or event you are dealing with. The information you 
gain is always useful to what you’re doing.
I am a young American girl from 1939. Because of a magic tornado, I crashed into Broken Europe with a 
strange doctor named Norman Henkle. I am suffering from a rare form of OZena, which disfigures my face 
and has blighted my life ever since I was a child. Dr. Henkle deceived me with the promise of a cure and a way 
back to my time, asking me to become a witch hunter. I committed crimes, even murders, until the Order put 
an end to my madness. I was forgiven and found in the Order a new home that I don’t want to run away from.

darkEgo.name: Dark Ego - From Another World
darkEgo.description:
As a creature displaced in time, you 
are naturally resistant to magic. Y ou gain 2 Additional Successes when defending 
yourself from a danger associated with magic. When you inflict 1 Wound on a 
being associated with magic, you prevent them from using their powers (Gifts and 
Descriptors) during their next action. Blocking the powers of particularly powerful 
opponents and Hunters may require a Position Check. When you touch a magic or 
enchanted object, you can spend 1 Soma to temporarily interrupt its power. The 
duration of this effect is decided by the Storyteller.
darkEgo.trigger:
Reveal that you’re from another time through a gesture or a word. 
Alternatively, act threatening towards a magical being.

actors.equipment:
A green cape with a wide and drooping hood / A blade of 
modern design / A bag full of small objects from my time / A 
mask of delicate workmanship that depicts a suffering face / My 
trusty silver shoes / A series of stilettos hidden in my blond 
hair / The medal of my dear deceased dog.

actors.name: Sherazade the Weaver of Tales
actors.story:
I hate violence in all its forms and all I wish to do is brighten people’s hearts through stories 
and poems.
descriptors:
I know over a thousand stories and from each one I draw 
a lesson with which to face dangers. I’ d do anything to 
learn a new story.

I know the delicate art of flattery and I know how to best 
compliment others to make them feel good. I will not 
tolerate those who use violence.

Sherazade 
the Weaver of
