Tales
My stories become reality. Shadows, those ubiquitous reflections of 
reality, can interact with me. A life among the shadows in my bedroom 
has made it hard for me to bear sunlight.

gifts.name: The Tale
gifts.description:
Y ou start each Scenario with 3 Story Tokens. 
Once per Scene, you may tell a short story. If you do, spend 
1 Story Token and declare a Keyword that appears in your 
narrative, then mark it down on your Sheet. During the 
Scenario, if a Keyword you have marked is introduced during 
a Scene by the Storyteller (for example, the Keyword is Soldier 
and you come across Soldiers), erase the word to get 1 XP and 
2 Additional Successes for either your next action or that of 
one of your allies. When you learn an interesting new story, 
you receive 1 Story Token.

gifts.name: Words Like Honey
gifts.description:
Y ou can speak beautiful words 
to bring out a memory, an emotion, or a fear. Spend 1 Story 
Token and choose one Keyword. Each NPC or Hunter who 
has listened to you and is connected to the Keyword will 
be overwhelmed by their emotions and will have to create 
a relevant Descriptor and keep it throughout the Scene. 
Particularly powerful subjects and Hunters who oppose your 
power may require a Position Check. Y our allies receive 1 
Additional Success in the first action they take when using 
any Descriptor created by this Gift.
I am the greatest storyteller that has ever lived, having learned my skills after serving a 
wealthy sultan for many years. I can’t remember why I left, but I suddenly found myself in 
Europe, where I used my skills against the Order and the Hunters. After my defeat, I was 
forgiven, for it was clear to my jailers that a dark force had clouded my mind. I serve the Order 
to regain my freedom, but also to find the one who corrupted my heart, forcing me to do harm.

darkEgo.name: Dark Ego - One Thousand and One Nights
darkEgo.description:
One of the 
characters in a story you told during the Session comes to life as a Shadow. 
Create a Descriptor for them, ensuring it is driven to support you. The 
Shadow could, for example, fly or walk on water. The Shadow thus created 
will be at your service and will do whatever you order with an OL Medium 5 
and 1 Wound. For each Story Token you decide to spend, you can summon 
an additional Shadow. Y our Shadows do not speak and cannot act in places 
where there is more light than darkness.
darkEgo.trigger:
Manifest your affinity for the shadows or tell a dark story full of 
fear and monsters.
XP
Soma
 6

actors.equipment:
Precious oriental dresses / A veil of red silk with which to cover 
my face / A huge storybook / Incense and perfumes / A bag 
full of gifts given by adoring nobles, who had been enthralled 
by the stories I told / A small dagger coated with poison / The 
comb with which I brushed the hair of my beloved sister / 
The egg of a strange creature that was given to me as a gift by 
Sinbad, the Traveler of a Thousand Seas.

actors.name: Talia the Sleeper
actors.story:
I am a cursed daughter, born from a forbidden love, destined to sleep forever. However, 
my mind is alert and I perceive what is happening in the world around me. The curse that 
afflicts me allows me to manipulate objects, which is why the Order kept me alive after saving 
me from the castle that was my home and prison. As a Hunter, I am committed to ending 
injustice and I hope to find a cure for my curse. However, the only thing I truly wish to find is 
someone who won’t break my heart.
descriptors:
My body floats, carried by my power, ignoring obstacles of all 
kinds. I can use my very long hair as if it were my hands. I 
travel in a heavy nun’s habit and wear a mask to hide my true 
condition from the world.

I can communicate with those who are asleep or 
understand their desires and fears through dreams. I hate 
it when there are too many people around. The buzz of their 
lives reminds me of what I can’t have.

I can move objects with the power of thought alone. Through this power, 
I am able to manifest my presence in the world. My real body is immobile 
and locked in eternal sleep, at the mercy of the world. I long for the 
least caress, which would remind me of being alive.

gifts.name: The Cloak
gifts.description:
Y our large nun’s cloak floats to defend you from 
the world and contains many small items that you can manipulate. 
Thanks to this Gift you are able to float and hover in the air, but 
always at a speed equal to the pace of a human. Once per Scene, 
you may:
1. Hide an object inside your cloak, hiding it from everyone (even 
when searching through magic).
2. Extract from your cloak an object that you need. It can be rare 
and peculiar, but not magic or unique.

gifts.name: In the Dream
gifts.description:
Once per Scene, you can freely 
communicate with a subject who is unconscious through a 
dream. Alternatively, you may choose to spend 1 Soma to “read” 
the dreams of a conscious subject. The Storyteller will reveal all or 
part of the subject’s Agenda to you through the narration of one 
of their dreams. Particularly powerful subjects and Hunters may 
require a Position Check to be able to capture their dreams.

darkEgo.name: Dark Ego - The Sleeping Will
darkEgo.description:
Y ou can use your power to 
manipulate the objects around you. Y ou can make small items float or 
throw them like weapons. Y ou can affect your surroundings up to 30 feet 
away. Y ou can act up to 3 times in an Exchange, manipulating the world 
around you, but you cannot act more than once against the same target. 
Once per Scene, you can focus all 3 actions on a single large object (like a 
house) and manipulate it to your liking.
darkEgo.trigger:
Shed your cloak, revealing your helpless body or exposing yourself 
to others by manipulating the world around you.

actors.equipment:
A large nun’s cloak / A long hood with a veil hiding my face / 
Objects and small things that float under my cloak / A piece 
of ivy that has remained clinging to my left arm / The diary 
in which I wrote about my sad life before the curse.

actors.name: Yvonne of the Dark
descriptors:
I died with my beloved candles in my hand and 
was reborn with the power to control fire. I hate 
staying in the darkness and I always want at least 
a small source of light.

I have no choice but to remain in my childish 
body for eternity. I have a sweet smile and 
people often feel protective towards me. Animals 
perceive me for who I really am and they act up 
in my presence.

gifts.name: Light the Flame
gifts.description:
Y ou can manipulate fire, as 
long as there is already a flame in the environment. 
Decide whether to increase or decrease its size or 
intensity, as well as the direction it burns. Y ou can 
also manipulate the flame to hit something within 
nine feet of it. Y ou gain 1 Additional Success to each 
action you take while manipulating fire. The first time 
you use this Gift in a Scene, the Storyteller may decide 
that your action will spread the flames in some way.

gifts.name: Innocent Smile
gifts.description:
When you talk to someone, 
you can spend 1 Soma to provoke their sympathy (the 
Storyteller will evaluate whether or not the subject is 
sensitive to your influence) to create an Agenda in 
which the target feels somehow responsible for you. 
During a Scene, if the location is crowded, you can 
act or move without anyone noticing.

darkEgo.name: Dark Ego – Solitary Ghost
darkEgo.description:
When you decide to take on your ghostly 
form, you receive 1 Solitude Token and become intangible. Y ou cannot have any kind 
of physical interaction with the world (not even talking) and no one can touch you, 
except through magic. However, you do not become invisible to the human eye and so 
those who see you will understand that you are a ghost. In the form of a specter, your 
affinity to fire is more intense and you gain 1 Additional Success in any action involving 
the flames you are manipulating. In addition, you can spend 1 Soma to ignite a flame 
from thin air and set something on fire. The effect of this Gift lasts until you decide to 
stop it, but the Storyteller can spend 1 Solitude Token to force you to remain ethereal 
for a few more minutes. When you take an Interlude or spend time with someone who cares about you, remove all Solitude Tokens. When you use this Gift without satisfying 
the Activator, you can ignore the Wound and take 1 Solitude Token instead.
darkEgo.trigger: React angrily when the world ignores you or makes it clear to you that no one cares about you.

actors.equipment:
A worn-out cape / A bag full of candles / A tinderbox and dry sticks 
/ Alcohol and other flammable substances / Some coins received as 
charity / A small rosary donated by someone I don’t remember.

actors.name: Miss Snow and Lady Storm
actors.story:
Y ou can spend 1 Soma when you use this Gift to blow a kiss to the target, 
thus avoiding physical contact.
descriptors:
I am a novice a powerful sorceress with limited power total control 
over cold and snow. My magic can come with dangerous, unintended 
consequences cause small unwanted effects.

I am good at understanding dominating people. I have a unique 
ability to comprehend their desires. I tend to distrust even close allies 
trust those I don’t know.

Cold and frost have no effect on me are extensions of my soul and I feel 
a great affinity for winter. My heart of pure ice delights is easily touched 
when I see others suffer.

gifts.name: Snow Sorceress
gifts.description:
Y ou can use magic to create and manipulate the 
cold. Describe the effects of a spell that has one of the following Keywords 
as a condition: Ice, Snow, or Frost. Y ou could, for example, Create an Ice 
Bridge to cross a crevasse or Freeze an Enemy to immobilize it. Pay a cost 
of 1 to 3 Soma, decided by the Storyteller, to activate the spell. The effects 
you describe last until the end of the Scene. The Soma cost is increased by 
1 when environmental conditions are not compatible with cold. Y ou can 
decide to lower the cost of the spell by 1 Soma, but this will cause a minor 
magical accident on par with an Outcome with a Cost.

gifts.name: Winter’s Kiss
gifts.description:
In you lies the power of winter. When you give 
someone a chaste kiss, you can choose one of the following effects:
1. Erase one of their memories. It must be the memory of an event in the 
Scene in which you use this effect. Particularly capable Hunters and 
NPCs may require a Position Check for the effect to succeed.
2. Make the subject immune to cold throughout the rest of the Scene. 
This will prevent them from suffering frost Wounds and allow them to 
ignore the effects of Lady Storm’s snowstorm.
3. Make an object extremely fragile.

darkEgo.name: Dark Ego - Snow Queen
darkEgo.description:
The tiny fragment of a magic mirror lies in 
your right eye, relegating the real you to oblivion. But when tears warm your 
eyes, or you hear the word that represents your dominion over the cold, Lady 
Storm comes to her senses and woe to those who stand before her.
While you are Lady Storm, you can lower the Soma cost of Snow Sorceress 
by 1 without creating magical accidents. In addition, you can use Winter’s 
Kiss at a distance without spending Soma. If you wish, you can summon a 
snowstorm that will sweep over your location regardless of previous weather 
conditions. Inside the storm, visibility is reduced to about three feet, and all 
involved lower their OL by 1 for each action. While the snowstorm rages, you 
can use the Gift Winter’s Kiss as a free action once per Exchange. This Gift 
ends, and the Hunter becomes Miss Snow once more as soon as you suffer 1 
Wound, or at the end of the Scene.
darkEgo.trigger:
Cry over something that genuinely moved you. You hear the word 
“Eternity” spoken by someone who is not aware that it will awaken Lady Storm.

actors.equipment:
A brooch in the shape of a sleigh / A small knife with a blade made of ice that 
never melts / A large key to a castle whose location you ignore / Spellbooks / A 
mirror fragment with a strange magical aura.

actors.name: Tremoteus Rumpel
descriptors:
I have an encyclopedic memory and there is no law that I don’t 
know. I hate to break the rules.

My reputation precedes me, and my word is held in the highest 
regard by anyone with an ounce of honesty. I detest criminals and 
those who act to harm the innocent. Big or small, a crime is still 
a crime.

I am a keen disputant and have an uncanny ability to detect 
deception. I need hard evidence before I’ll accuse someone of 
dishonesty.

gifts.name: Examine the Evidence
gifts.description:
Y ou can use each of the following effects 
once per Scene: 
1. For the Record: Y ou can make a note of something a subject has said; 
you will never forget it. Write it down because you can use it when you 
activate your Dark Ego. By spending 1 Soma, the Storyteller will reveal a 
weakness of the subject whose words you have memorized.
2. Consult the Laws: The Storyteller will reveal to you the customs and 
rules of a social group or place you are in. By spending 1 Soma, you 
can create a loophole, known only to you, to the rules that have been 
revealed.
3. The Decisive Proof: When you examine an object, the Storyteller 
will reveal a quality or feature that few people may notice. By spending 
1 Soma, you will learn who was the last person to own or use what you 
are examining.

gifts.name: Your Honor
gifts.description:
If you stand in front of nobles, lawmen, or leaders in 
general, you can spend 1 Soma to have them recognize your name or 
reputation. If you use your identity as a strength, you gain 1 Additional 
Success. If you give your word in a negotiation, you gain 1 Additional 
Success in a possible Position Check.

darkEgo.name: Dark Ego - Shattered Pact
darkEgo.description:
Those who break the rules must be 
punished. Y ou gain 1 Additional Success on all Position and Defense 
Checks you make against a subject who’s acting in a way that contradicts 
the statement you recorded using the For the Record effect. If you act 
to harm them, you also inflict 1 Additional Wound. Once per Scene, if 
a subject reveals themselves as they really are, as opposed to how they 
previously presented themselves, or if they break their word, you can 
lecture them on their dishonesty. All your companions gain 1 Additional 
Success on their next action.
darkEgo.trigger:
Make an argument against the guilty by pointing out their 
misdeeds.

actors.equipment:
A long lawyer’s robe / A magnifying glass / Documents and deeds from 
over a hundred trials / A fine dueling sword / Property deeds and bank 
deposits / A ring of little value given to me by my first client / A scroll of 
recommendations written by the Pope himself.

actors.name: Prince Trollo the Innocent
actors.story:
Y ou gain 1 Additional Success for each Check you make when trying 
to persuade someone to do the right thing. Once per Scenario, if you 
suffer 1 Wound to stand up for what you believe in, you set an example 
for those who help you. Each ally recovers 1 Soma, and a target of your 
choice (Hunter or NPC) immediately gains an additional action they 
must use to try to help you or get you to safety.
descriptors:
I am a young prince, well-versed in the etiquette of the court. I 
am a diligent student, my favorite subjects being history and 
poetry. I am not ashamed of my strange appearance and I hate to 
hide from others.

I use these qualities to uphold the good name of my family. I will 
not allow anyone to violate the ideals of justice and courage with 
which I was raised.

I have strange powers, and my body is stronger and more resilient 
than an ordinary child’s. While I’m not ashamed of my 
appearance, these uncanny abilities mark me as different, and I 
try not to attract attention when I use my power.

gifts.name: Noble Birth
gifts.description:
Once per Scene, if you are in a place where your family’s 
authority is recognized, you can gain access to a restricted location, such 
as a dungeon or castle, or a direct audience with an authority figure. 
As a prince, you have learned everything a future ruler needs to know. 
Once per Scene, you gain 2 Additional Successes for an action in which 
you can demonstrate your knowledge of history and poetry, or your skill 
with the sword. 
I learned kindness from my mother and firmness from my father.

gifts.name: Good Heart
gifts.description: Y ou have the innocence and strength of a true ruler.

darkEgo.name: Dark Ego - Oknytt’s Legacy
darkEgo.description:
Y ou appeal to your Dark Ego to gain 
great powers. If it is day, you must spend 1 Soma. If you have no Soma, 
you take 1 Wound. If it is night, there is no cost to activate this Gift, as 
you are a creature of the night. Y ou gain the following powers:
1. Yellow Eyes: See perfectly in total darkness. Once per Scene, you can 
see a target for what they really are, unmasking any disguise they may 
be wearing. 
2. Troll Strength: Once per Scene, you can perform an act of unprecedented strength by lifting or moving a weight equal to ten men. If you 
use your strength to harm someone, you inflict 1 Additional Wound. 
3. Stone Skin: Once per Scene, you can suffer an attack or hazard while 
avoiding any Wounds. Y ou can resist almost everything, including fire, 
falls, and weapons. Only magic can harm you. Y ou must declare the use 
of this effect before any Defense Check.
darkEgo.trigger:
You tap into your heritage in front of someone you have helped 
before and who is unaware of your true nature.

actors.equipment:
Clothes of fine workmanship / A small wooden crown painted with gold, 
given to me by my father / A splendid short sword / A bag containing 
everything needed to process milk and make butter / A precious bracelet 
engraved with a cradle, a gift from my mother / A well-worn blanket that 
I love and use as a cloak / A bag full of coins and valuables that 
I often lose.

actors.name: Pietrik and the Cauldron Fae
descriptors:
I am a rebel who is used to living on the streets. I know my way 
around the slums and how to deal with the lowlifes. Rules are 
made to be broken.

I fear nothing and throw myself into any situation. The 
adrenaline of risk drives me to succeed. I get bored easily in 
situations where there is no danger.

The Cauldron Fae is always with me, in the form of a small 
floating light. Her magic is still powerful, and I often summon 
her to wreak havoc or play tricks on humans.

gifts.name: Lost Childhood
gifts.description:
Despite your young age, you have no qualms about 
taking action against enemies. Y ou gain 1 Additional Success in all 
actions that require the use of subterfuge. If you attack a target that is 
unaware of your presence, you inflict 1 Additional Wound.

gifts.name: Fearless
gifts.description:
Y ou are immune to any fear or mind control effects that 
prevent you from acting as you wish. If you suffer 1 Wound from an 
Opponent or Threat, you may regain 1 Soma in your next action and 
may consider a Failure as an Outcome with a Cost.

darkEgo.name: Dark Ego - The Magic of Disbelief
darkEgo.description:
The Cauldron Fae unleashes 
her magic to enable you to perform amazing actions. As an action, 
you can formulate a magic sentence including the fragment I don’t 
believe and make its effect concrete. For example, “I don’t believe in 
gravity” would allow you to fly, while “I don’t believe the Hunters of 
the Order exist” would allow you to hurt the Hunters in an attempt to 
make them disappear. If your statement has no offensive effect, spend 
1 Soma to gain the power you summoned for the entire Scene. On 
the other hand, if you want the spell to affect a target 
other than yourself, spend 1 Soma 
to inflict a Wound or apply the effect without making a Check. Each 
time you use the Magic of Disbelief, roll a die. On a roll of 5 or 6, the 
Storyteller gains 1 Prank Token. The Storyteller can spend 1 Prank 
Token during a Scene to activate the effect of this Gift (you do not take a 
Wound because the Activator was not normally triggered) and have the 
Cauldron Fae cast a spell to complicate your life or attempt to damage 
something that represents progress and modernity. If the Storyteller has 
no accumulated Prank Tokens, you may choose to ignore all the Soma 
costs to activate the effects of this Gift, but the Storyteller will gain 1 
Prank Token.
darkEgo.trigger:
Without thinking about the possible consequences, throw 
yourself into an action that is impossible for an ordinary person.

actors.equipment:
A dueling blade / A book of fairytales given to me by Gwendolyn, the only 
person I consider a friend / A necklace with a little bell / A worn pirate flag 
I keep as a trophy / A set of sharp needles.

actors.name: Loki the Deceiver
descriptors:
I can disguise myself to assume any identity. I can easily imitate 
men, women, and even fantastical creatures. I have great respect 
for a successful deception and hate to expose it, even if it would 
benefit me.

I am a skilled acrobat, I tell stories, perform magic tricks, and put 
my audience in a good mood. I enjoy chaos and adding confusion 
to situations is a way for me to bring balance to the world.

I am a master at distorting and unraveling deception. Verbal 
and body language hold no secrets for me. I don’t like to get my 
hands dirty and would rather have someone else do it for me.

gifts.name: Thousand Faces
gifts.description:
Once per Scene, you can assume the identity of 
another Hunter. Choose a Hunter’s Sheet that no one is using and use it 
for the rest of the Scene. Y ou have access to all the Gifts and abilities on 
the Sheet, with the exception of the Soma points and Wounds, which you 
will keep from Loki’s Sheet. Even though you have their likeness, you are 
not the Hunter you are impersonating, so you do not know their personal 
history and cannot activate the Special Scenario Gifts associated with 
them. Any effects of the Gifts you activate while impersonating another 
Hunter will end when you return to your true identity or at the end of 
the Scene. If someone discovers who you really are, your masquerade 
ends and you take 1 Wound. If you wish, you can return to your original 
appearance before the end of the Scene. If you discover a deception and 
do nothing to expose it, you gain 1 Soma.

gifts.name: Trickster
gifts.description:
Y ou get 2 Additional Successes if you use your skills as 
an entertainer to perform an action. This includes polite conversation, 
sleight of hand, or performing stunts. Once per Scene, if you help an 
enemy (for example as a Cost), you gain 1 Soma.

darkEgo.name: Dark Ego - The Great Deception
darkEgo.description:
The whole world is a lie, and only 
those who are truly aware of it can pull the strings of any story. During 
the course of the Scene, you can activate each of the following effects 
once:
1. Materialize an item that is useful for the situation you are facing and 
that an ally of yours is carrying without knowing it.
2. Switch places with a Minor NPC. The exchange takes place in the 
blink of an eye, and those present will only see where you are now 
and where your target has ended up. Highly skilled NPCs and other 
Hunters are immune to this effect.
3. Make an NPC that you have met before appear in the Scene. This is 
an illusion that will do your bidding and will dissolve as soon as it 
takes 1 Wound or it becomes clear that it is not the real person.
4. Gain 1 Additional Success in a Check you make by exploiting a 
subject’s character flaw.
darkEgo.trigger:
Organize a deception by studying it in detail, or expose a 
deception to the people being deceived.

actors.equipment:
Theatrical costume / A snake-shaped flask containing a strong acid / A 
necklace of great value engraved with the word “Brísingamen” / Various 
musical instruments and juggling equipment / A series of sharp daggers 
hidden throughout my clothing / A diary in which are written the 
names of all the men and women whose hearts I have broken.

actors.name: The Silent Mother
descriptors:
I know my way around high society and have amassed great 
wealth through countless marriages. I am known in the 
underworld for my exploits. I hate being accused of being a 
criminal.

I am able to understand the potential of young women and know 
how to guide their steps to develop their true potential. I consider 
each of my protégés a true daughter and would give my life to 
save them.

Although I appear helpless, I am a capable spy who knows how to 
defend herself in dangerous situations. I never miss an opportunity 
to accumulate wealth and resources.

gifts.name: Legacy
gifts.description:
Y ou can use all the resources you have accumulated from 
your many marriages of convenience. Y ou can use each of these effects 
once per Scenario:
1. A Family Asset: Y ou can bring a large property into play, such as 
a mansion or business. Y ou have free access to the property and its 
resources.
2. A Family Friend: Y ou can introduce a Minor NPC who has a debt or 
partnership agreement with your family. The Storyteller will sketch the 
NPC, who will be well-disposed towards you.
3. A Family Treasure: Y ou can bring into play a rare and valuable item 
that you own as a family heirloom.

gifts.name: My Beloved Daughters
gifts.description:
Two young girls you saved from an 
unfortunate fate follow you on your adventures. Y our adopted 
daughters are two Minor NPCs with the following profiles:
OL Medium 5 - (1 Wound)
Decide on their names and stories, and work with the Storyteller to 
create a Descriptor for each of them that describes their abilities. Y our 
adopted daughters cannot have magical abilities or more than a good 
education in their chosen discipline. Y our daughters will do their best to 
serve you at every opportunity.

darkEgo.name: Dark Ego - The Caring Mother
darkEgo.description:
Choose a female NPC or Hunter 
and name her your Pupil. Y our Pupil must be young and, in your 
opinion, deserving of your benevolence. Y ou will always know where 
your Pupil is, and she will gain 1 Additional Success to her actions (or 
increase her OL by 1 in the case of an NPC) if you are present in the 
Scene to comfort her with your words. Y ou get 1 Additional Success if 
you act against someone who endangers your Pupil. If an NPC or Hunter 
uses a Gift to harm your disciple, you can spend 1 Soma to prevent the 
Gift from being activated.
darkEgo.trigger:
Your words inspire a young girl to find her way or protect her 
from injustice.

actors.equipment:
Noble robes / Family jewelry and wealth / Two trained pigeons you can 
use to send messages / A set of long sewing pins / A long cloak and a mask 
depicting a smiling mother / A sublimely crafted weapon.

actors.name: Karasu Kuroi the Wandering Monk
actors.story: Y ou can mentally communicate for the rest of the Scene.
descriptors:
I am an exorcist monk. My body is tempered by a lifetime of asceticism 
and fighting evil spirits. I do not tolerate blasphemy and those who use 
knowledge for personal gain.

Prayer keeps my mind steadfast and my words are an inspiration to 
those who have faith. I do not tolerate the concepts of faith and 
devotion being questioned.

My greatest secret is that I am like those I fight. My true essence is that 
of a Yokai ghost, which is why I have a talent for unearthing Broken 
Tales. I try to do good deeds in the hope of reincarnating as a human.

gifts.name: Monk
gifts.description:
Y ou can spend 1 Soma to activate a piece of your Spirit Hunter 
Equipment:
1. Pastoral Shakujo: Banging your staff on the ground can temporarily 
interrupt the effect of a spell or curse. The duration of the interruption (set by 
the Storyteller) can vary from a few moments to the entire Scene, depending 
on the power of the spell.
2. Hauchiwa Fan: With a fan blast, you can make a leap of up to ten meters 
forward or upward. Y ou can use this effect on an ally.
3. Tengu-gui Mask: Y ou can wear your mask to change your facial features, taking on a physical appearance appropriate to the context. Create a 
Descriptor that represents your appearance, but remember that you cannot 
replicate the features of a specific subject. When you activate a Gift or suffer 1 
Wound, you will revert to your original appearance. 
The use of this Gift is limited by the possession of the corresponding 
Equipment: if you lose an item, you cannot use the relevant option until you 
recover it. During an Interlude, you recover any missing Equipment.

gifts.name: Moral Rigor
gifts.description:
Y ou demonstrate righteousness in word and deed. Y ou gain 
1 Additional Success on all Position Checks where you make a commitment 
by giving your word as a guarantee. By spending 1 Soma, you can make 
mental contact with a subject present in the Scene who must accept the link.

darkEgo.name: Dark Ego - You Are What You Fight
darkEgo.description:
When you reveal your true nature, 
your body changes into the form of a humanoid raven. Y ou will gain the 
following abilities:
1. Y ou can move by flying thanks to the large wings on your back. Y ou gain 
1 Additional Success on all Defense Checks while hovering in the air. 
2. Y ou can use your large beak to strike an enemy as an additional action, 
but you cannot communicate by speaking.
3. Y ou gain 1 Additional Success if you act to injure someone who has 
inflicted 1 Wound on you in the current Scene.
darkEgo.trigger: You reveal your true nature to prove that not all spirits are evil.

actors.equipment:
My prized traveling Shakujō / My prized Hauchiwa fan / A Tengu-gui raven 
mask / A theater mask with a long nose that I use to hide my Asian features / A 
katana that belonged to a famous samurai / A traveling bag containing boiled 
rice and bean paste.

actors.name: The 7 Hessian Mercenaries
actors.story:
Outcome with an Increment: The goal has been reached, and the team has 
brought home something important. The Storyteller will tell you what.
descriptors:
We are experienced mercenaries and have seen every battlefield. We 
hate working for free and any chance to bring home some extra loot is 
good.

We are adept at getting things, information, people, or anything you 
want - ask and we will find it. We are intolerant of authority and 
anything with a hierarchy of command.

Discipline and order are the keys to victory. We act as a team because 
that is what has allowed us to survive so far. Team first and foremost.

gifts.name: The Team
gifts.description:
At the beginning of each Scene, you choose the 3 members 
of the Main Team. Y ou will receive the 3 Gifts and the Special Equipment of 
the members you have chosen. The other 4 dwarves form the Support Team. 
The Main Team acts as a single Hunter and receives 1 Penalty to Checks for 
each team member not present in a Scene. Wounds are also cumulative for all 
members, and any member can act until the Team takes its last Wound. During 
a Scene, you can spend 1 Soma to swap a Main Team member for a Support 
Team member.

gifts.name: On Mission
gifts.description:
Once per Scene, you can send the Support Team on a mission 
to accomplish a goal, such as capturing an NPC, discovering information, or 
anything else you deem useful. The Storyteller sets the OL of the mission just 
like a normal Position Check. To find out what happens, you must make a 
Position Check, where you get 1 Base Success for each Support Team Member 
(usually 4), but you cannot spend Soma to get Additional Successes. Depending 
on the result:
Failure: The objective was missed, and one of the team members is out of the 
game for the rest of the Scenario. Describe what happened in the words of the 
returning teammates. If the story makes at least one other Player laugh, you will 
recover 1 Soma.
Outcome with a Cost: The goal was completed, but there were problems. The 
Storyteller describes how it went and suggests a complication.
Standard Outcome: Goal completed, no problems.

darkEgo.name: Dark Ego - Heigh-ho, Heigh-ho
darkEgo.description:
If you are preparing for a confrontation, 
no one can stand up to you. If it is on a mission, the Support Team immediately 
re-enters the Scene (even if it means interrupting another task assigned through 
the On Mission Gift), with all the narrative benefits that can bring. For the rest 
of the Scene, the Main and Support Teams will act as a single Hunter 2 times 
per Exchange, not consecutively. Any personal Gifts from the various members 
may be used.
darkEgo.trigger:
Begin a confrontation or challenge with the singing of your battle 
hymn.

actors.equipment:
Swords and guns in abundance / Shovels and picks for digging holes and trenches / 
Nuts and playing cards / A bottle of fine brandy waiting for its chance to be opened 
/ The key to the secret hiding place where we have accumulated our life’s earnings, 
but whose location no one remembers (damned drunks!) / A handkerchief for 
each of us, sewn by a pure and special girl we defended from the Order Hunters / 
Tobacco and wine.

actors.name: Circe the Alchemist
actors.story: Eurylochus cannot use more than one Pharmaka special effect per Scene.
descriptors:
I have studied alchemy with the greatest masters, and my potions can produce wondrous effects. I am so drawn to knowledge that I neglect 
my own safety.

Eurylochus is my faithful servant pig and helps me with every task. He 
has an almost human intelligence and one look is enough to understand 
us. I love him like a brother.

I have a special power over people who are hopelessly attracted to my 
presence. I am shy and often break down when I receive too much 
explicit attention.

gifts.name: Pharmaka
gifts.description:
At the beginning of each Scenario, you receive 3 Pharmaka 
Tokens. Spend 1 Token when someone ingests one of your potions, then pick 
one of the following effects:
1. The subject transforms into an animal of your choice for the remainder of 
the Scene. The person retains their human intelligence. 
2. The subject is in a confused state, which lowers their OL by 1 (or 1 Penalty in the case of a Hunter) for the rest of the Scene.
3. The subject regains vitality and gains an Additional Wound that fades at 
the end of the Scene.
Y ou are naturally resistant to your creations, and if you want to activate an 
effect on yourself, you must spend 1 Soma in addition to a Pharmaka Token. 
Particularly powerful subjects and Hunters may require you to perform 
a Position Check before they suffer the effects of your potions. During an Interlude, or if you get your hands on valuable alchemical ingredients, you can 
recover 1 Pharmaka Token.

gifts.name: Travel Companion
gifts.description:
Eurylochus is a Minor NPC with the following profile:
OL 5 Medium - (2 Wounds) 
Descriptor: I am Circe’s faithful pig servant and would do anything for her. 
Eurylochus has always been your companion in experimentation, and over the 
years he has been imbued with the power of Pharmaka. By spending 1 Soma, 
you can activate one of the following effects:
1. Human Form: Eurylochus takes the form of a handsome young man with 
flowing blond hair. He cannot speak but gains all the other advantages of a 
human body.
2. Size Change: Eurylochus can shrink to the size of a mouse or grow to the 
size of an elephant. The effect lasts for the duration of the Scene.
3. Regeneration: Eurylochus will recover all of his Wounds, which can also 
bring him back into action if he is down to zero.

darkEgo.name: Dark Ego - Goddess Blood
darkEgo.description:
Y ou have the power of a goddess within you, 
even if you do not know how to use it. When you activate your aura, you 
choose an NPC who will be kind to you and try to fulfill your every wish. This 
Gift will have no effect on someone who has hostile intentions towards you, 
but you will gain 2 Additional Successes on all Defense Checks you make, 
since harming you seems an unnatural action even to those who hate you.
Y ou can activate all of the Travel Companion Gift’s effects on Eurylochus at 
the same time.
darkEgo.trigger:
Unleash your divine power with a charming or swaggering attitude 
at the most inopportune moment.

actors.equipment:
Your precious portable laboratory / A bag of alchemical components / A pair of 
smoke vials / A pair of acid vials / A pair of reagent vials / The pharmacopeia you 
are writing / A small bag of fruit for Eurylochus / A tome on the animal world 
/ A perfectly balanced metal staff / Scissors, scalpels, and pliers / A magnifying 
glass.

actors.name: Captain William of Nottingham
descriptors:
I am a good planner and carry all kinds of useful equipment for 
my work. I hate sudden changes of plans.

I am a lawman and I am proud of my office. I have good 
leadership skills and know how to get those in charge to carry out 
an order. I like to be praised for my abilities.

Years of working as a bounty hunter have made me adept at 
hunting down and eliminating villains. When I am one step away 
from my goal, I do not consider retreating.

gifts.name: Collect Taxes
gifts.description:
At the end of each Scene, you receive 1 Taxes Token 
if you have discovered riches or secrets related to a location or NPC that 
you can use to your advantage (at the Storyteller’s discretion). Y ou start 
each Scenario with 1 Taxes Token. At any time, you can spend 1 Taxes 
Token to activate one of these effects:
1. Ask the Storyteller to reveal an NPC’s Gift or Equipment.
2. Allow an ally to activate a Gift by replacing a special requirement or 
Soma cost.
3. Confer 1 Additional Success to the action of an allied Hunter.

gifts.name: Lawman
gifts.description:
Y ou can spend 1 Soma to assert your authority over 
ordinary people. NPCs who recognize local authority will not try to 
harm you unless you act aggressively first. Even in cases of conflict, they 
will avoid choosing you as a target unless you are the first to threaten 
them. Y ou gain 1 Additional Success if you try to convince or intimidate 
someone who recognizes authority.

darkEgo.name: Dark Ego - Capture the Outlaws
darkEgo.description:
Under your leadership, evildoers 
are short-lived. Receive 2 Taxes Tokens. At any time during the Scene, 
you can spend 1 Taxes Token to activate the following additional effects. 
Each effect can only be activated once per Exchange:
1. Allow one of your allies to act immediately to carry out one of your 
orders, even if they have already acted in the Exchange.
2. Gain 2 Additional Successes for any action you take to stop (not 
eliminate) a criminal or prevent his escape.
3. Reveal an aspect of an NPC’s private business to your advantage, 
such as a connection to another NPC or what they are trying to 
protect at all costs.
darkEgo.trigger: Act to capture or render harmless subjects you deem evil.

actors.equipment:
A short sword / A black powder pistol / A long cloak of green cloth / A bag 
full of coins / Handcuffs of thick metal / Coats of arms and medals earned 
in service / A fine cross necklace given me by my old flame Marian / A 
certificate of merit penned by a prince.

actors.name: Moriarty the Gentleman Thief
actors.source: Broken Tales - Lost Stories - Exclusive Pre-Gen Hunters.pdf
descriptors:
I am an experienced criminal and I know what it takes to pull off 
a perfect heist. Planning and precision are the basis for success, 
and I refuse to rely on improvisation or luck.

My misdeeds have made me a real celebrity - I have clashed with 
heroes, nobles, and religious people, and I know how to deal with 
each of them. Sometimes I like to give my enemies a small 
advantage just to make the challenge more interesting.

I am as ingenious in the use of concealed weapons and low blows 
as I am in plotting crime. The memory of my lost love has changed 
me deeply, and I try to prevent crime from creating innocent 
victims.

gifts.name: Diabolical Plan
gifts.description:
Once per Scenario, you can do each of the 
following:
1. Find a useful item (that you had previously planted) in your location. Receive 1 Spider Web Token.
2. Deliver a message to someone without anyone else noticing. The 
message will be delivered during the Scene and, if you wish, you 
will receive a reply at the beginning of the next Scene. Receive 1 
Spider Web Token.
3. Introduce an allied Minor NPC of yours to the Scene, who will be 
willing to testify on your behalf. Receive 1 Spider Web Token.

gifts.name: Dark Eminence
gifts.description:
Gain 1 Additional Success on all Checks involving 
deception or obtaining something illegally. When you arrive at a new 
location, the Storyteller will reveal the possible presence of criminal 
organizations and their misdeeds. If you strike a beneficial pact with 
a criminal or powerful organization, you will receive 1 Spider Web 
Token.

darkEgo.name: Dark Ego - The Napoleon of Crime
darkEgo.description:
When you reveal your plan in 
all its glory, the unsuspecting pawns of your game will be left speechless. 
Y ou will receive 2 Spider Web Tokens. Y ou can spend them as if they 
were Soma points. Y ou can also activate the following effects at any time 
in the Scene at a cost of 1 Spider Web Token each:
1. Discovering the Gift of an NPC. 
2. Allow an ally to activate their Dark Ego by ignoring the Activator. 
3. Provide 1 Additional Success to an Ally’s Position Check.
darkEgo.trigger:
Announce your plan loudly. Show everyone that what you 
have done before has created an advantage in the current situation.

actors.equipment:
Refined dandy’s clothes / A fine pipe to remember me by / A futuristic air 
pistol / A monocle of fine workmanship / A broad cape concealing stilettos 
and poisons / A bouquet of passe-partout / An animated staff / Boots with 
hidden pockets. 
I am the greatest criminal mastermind of all time, and the echoes of my misdeeds have reverberated around the world. Thanks to 
my incredible cunning, I have always made fools of the authorities, pulled off the most incredible thefts, and manipulated institutions 
like puppets in my hands. All this until I crossed paths with the World’s Most Famous Investigator. I knew immediately that he 
would be a challenge worthy of my talents, and for years we battled each other through misdeeds and investigations. On the day of 
our showdown, however, I realized the truth that I had always tried to hide in my heart. What united us was not rivalry, but the love 
that can only be felt for someone who is your perfect better half. Feigning death, we retired to private life, but the idyll was shortlived. Called to duty on an international case, he broke our pact and returned to the limelight to do what he does best. Distraught and 
wounded, I took refuge in the Order. As a Hunter, I used my brilliant mind to fight the darkness and forget my lost love. 
Moriarty 
the Gentleman 
Thief

actors.name: The Pale Medic
actors.source: Broken Tales - Lost Stories - Exclusive Pre-Gen Hunters.pdf
descriptors:
I am a good doctor and I know the cure for every disease, I can tell the 
physical state of health of a patient just by looking at them. I hate 
violence and physical confrontation.

I have a certain amount of charm and I know how to put people at ease 
with my polite manner. I feel uncomfortable in places where I have not 
been invited or where it is obvious that my presence is unwelcome.

I have vampire blood in me and my strength is far superior to that of 
an ordinary human. I am extremely sensitive to sunlight and try to 
avoid it as much as possible.

gifts.name: Cursed Blood
gifts.description:
Y our blood has incredible properties, so at the end of each 
Scene, you recover 1 Wound; this can allow you to return even if you have 
no Wounds left. Self-inflict 1 Wound to draw your blood. Whoever drinks it 
(except you) can choose one of the following effects:
1. Recover 1 Wound.
2. Gain 1 Additional Success (increases OL by 1 in the case of an NPC) on 
all Checks for the rest of the Scene. For each Check in which this bonus 
is used, roll a die: if you roll a 5 or 6, the blood’s effect ends.

gifts.name: Welcome to My House
gifts.description:
If you care for an NPC, or are able to talk to them 
in a social setting, you gain 1 Additional Success on any Position Checks you 
make to influence them. If the Check results in a Positive Outcome, you gain 
1 Additional Success on all Checks you make against that NPC for the rest of 
the Scenario. After your conversation, the Storyteller will reveal something 
you didn’t know about the NPC, such as part of their Agenda or a Gift you 
haven’t seen in action.

darkEgo.name: Dark Ego - The Vampire
darkEgo.description:
Self-inflict 1 Wound and release the power of 
the ancient curse that permeates your body. Y ou gain 1 Additional Success for 
each Position Check you make using your supernatural power. Y ou can use 
each of the following powers once per Scene:
1. Turn into a cloud of mist. In this form, you will move slowly but can 
avoid all obstacles. While in this form, you retain all your senses, can 
only be injured by magic, and cannot physically interact with objects or 
people.
2. Summon three wolves that will act under your total control. The wolves 
are Minor NPCs with the following profiles: 
OL Medium 5 - (1 Wound) - Descriptor: I am a big wild wolf, ready to 
fight to the death for my master. 
3. Communicate telepathically with another person on whom you used one 
of your Gifts during the Scenario.
darkEgo.trigger:
Drink and savor human blood in front of someone. Alternatively, 
break a crucifix or throw away garlic in disgust.

actors.equipment:
A dark doctor’s uniform / A pair of fine dark glasses / A vial of Transylvanian soil 
/ An ash stake crusted with blood / A doctor’s bag / A dozen vials of my blood / 
A necklace made by nomads / A vial of precious human blood.

actors.name: The Respectable Mr. and Mrs. Mars
actors.source: Broken Tales - Lost Stories - Exclusive Pre-Gen Hunters.pdf
actors.story: If you do, you will recover 2 Soma and gain 1 Invasion! Token.
descriptors:
We are a harmless middle-aged couple and no one would ever consider 
us a danger. We are adept at going unnoticed. Our passion for human 
food drives us to real binges.

We are always connected to the Mars Operations Center, and this 
allows us to have information about history and science. We are 
morbidly attracted to any form of art because it is totally absent on our 
world.

Our knowledge is far more advanced than human knowledge, and we 
have incredible technology at our disposal. We always try to help those 
who are considered outcasts or excluded from society...

gifts.name: Incognito Agents
gifts.description:
Y ou are considered a single Hunter, sharing Soma and 
Wounds, and can act 2 times per Exchange. If you are separated, each of you 
will receive 2 Penalties to any Checks you make alone. At the end of a Scene, 
you can wipe others’ memory of your being there.

gifts.name: Informants
gifts.description:
Once per Scene, you can ask for insight into an NPC, location, or 
event that has occurred. The Storyteller will provide you with information useful 
to your objectives. Once per Scene, if you witness the unleashing of technology, 
an invention, or a magical power, you can report back to the Operations Center.

darkEgo.name: Dark Ego - Alien Technology
darkEgo.description:
Y ou can always take advantage of your 
special Equipment:
1. Laser Pistol: An accurate and silent firearm capable of ignoring all 
common defenses. Wounds inflicted cannot be healed until the end of the 
Scenario. When a target is eliminated, it becomes a pile of ashes and cannot be 
healed, even with special Gifts.
2. Fog Generator: Instantly creates a thick black smoke that blocks the 
visibility of non-aliens. The smoke lasts for a few minutes but can be quickly 
dispersed by a strong wind.
3. Portable Tripod: A small multifunctional vehicle that moves on three legs 
and can carry up to six passengers. The Tripod can reach up to nine feet in 
height and can easily avoid obstacles thanks to its flexible legs. 
Whenever you use alien technology and one or more NPCs witness it, you 
get 1 Invasion! Token. At the end of each Scene in which you have used the 
Dark Ego, the Storyteller rolls 1 die for each Invasion! Token. If they roll at 
least one 6, the Invasion! Tokens are reset and your comrades initiate an attack 
on Earth. The Storyteller introduces 4 Martian Agents into the Scenario, who, 
if not eliminated by the end of it, will force you to return to the Operations 
Center, removing you from the current Campaign.
Martian Agent - OL Medium 5 - (1 Wound)
Descriptor: I am an alien skilled in guerrilla warfare. My monstrous appearance 
paralyzes foolish humans with terror. 
Agenda: Eliminate all humans, starting with the most dangerous individuals: 
the Hunters of the Order.
Gift - Armed for Invasion: A Martian Agent can use a single effect of Alien 
Technology 1 time per Scene.
darkEgo.trigger:
Show off your alien nature by using strange technology or revealing 
your true identity.

actors.equipment:
Well-made clothes / Walking umbrella and pipe / A small vase with a strange bright 
red seedling / A box of excellent chocolates / Various fake identity documents / 
A portrait of a couple commissioned from a famous painter.

actors.name: Doctor V. Frankenstein
actors.source: Broken Tales - Lost Stories - Exclusive Pre-Gen Hunters.pdf
actors.story:
Gift - Reanimated Corpse: The Creature is immune to electricity and 
cold. Once per Scene, when an ally is about to take 1 Wound, they can 
activate this Gift to have the Creature intervene in their defense and take 
the Wound instead. If Victor is the one requesting the use of this Gift, roll 
a die: if it comes up even, the Creature will act to save him by applying the 
effect; if it comes up odd, its deep resentment towards its creator will get 
the better of it and the Creature will not intervene, skipping its possible 
activation in the Exchange.
descriptors:
I am a luminary in physics and medicine and know secrets that the 
brightest academics can only dream of. I often get lost in my own 
reasoning, which I articulate aloud without realizing it.

I always bring the Creature with me and know how to make the 
most of its potential. There are times when the guilt of creating such 
a monster brings me back to reality, and in those rare moments, I 
try to do a good deed to atone for my sins.

My mad experiments have expanded my knowledge of death and 
the occult. I can tell the difference between science and magic. I 
greedily desire anything I deem useful for my research and have no 
qualms about obtaining it.

gifts.name: Behold my Genius
gifts.description:
By spending 1 Soma, you can use one of your 
futuristic discoveries to generate an electric shock that inflicts 1 Wound. 
The thunderbolt can strike up to twenty feet away and can change its 
trajectory to avoid obstacles. Alternatively, you can spend 1 Soma to 
charge an object with electricity, causing it to discharge when touched and 
inflicting 1 Wound. The object remains charged until the end of the Scene.

gifts.name: The Creature
gifts.description:
Y our first creation is an NPC managed by the Storyteller, 
with the following profile: 
OL Medium 5 - (4 Wounds)
Descriptor: I am a powerful creature who feels no pain and has the strength 
of four men. My appearance is disgusting because of the many stitches that 
hold the pieces of my body together.
Agenda: To be considered a person like any other and to find a family to take 
me in / I wish Victor to die, but as my creator, I cannot kill him with my own 
hands, and instead I try to facilitate his passing by acting indirectly.

darkEgo.name: Dark Ego - Reanimator
darkEgo.description:
Y ou appeal to the power of science to bring 
life where there is none. Y ou receive 3 Reanimator Tokens. At your touch, 
and by spending 1 Reanimator Token, an inanimate object or corpse will 
come to life for the duration of the Scene. Decide whether to also spend 
1 Soma to gain control of what you have animated, or to allow this new 
creature to have free will. The Storyteller will create an NPC profile for 
humans and animals (including the reanimation of a single part, such as 
a hand or leg), or a Threat profile in the case of an inanimate object, such 
as a door or rope. If you are in control, the creation will do whatever you 
tell it to do. If the creation is acting with free will, it will be moved by the 
Storyteller and may even turn against you.
darkEgo.trigger:
Dismember or dig up a corpse, ignoring the horror it may cause 
those watching.

actors.equipment:
Books on science and medicine / A surgeon’s bag / Vials and jars with pieces 
of cadavers preserved in alcohol / Electrodes / A valuable machine that 
generates electricity / A surgical gown / Scalpel and saw / False documents 
to gain access to morgues and cemeteries / A handkerchief embroidered with 
the name of my beloved Elizabeth.

actors.name: Lost Stories Exclusives Hunter 5
actors.source: Broken Tales - Lost Stories - Exclusive Pre-Gen Hunters.pdf
actors.story:
If your Champion is knocked out or killed, a new Champion will arrive at 
the beginning of the next Scenario. Y ou gain 1 Additional Success on all 
Checks where your action removes you from your Champion’s obsessive 
attention.
descriptors:
I have a talent for assessing people’s merits and flaws, so I am good at 
coordinating the efforts of those who trust me. I have a soft spot for those 
who fail but try hard, and though I don’t like to admit it, sometimes the 
instinct to help losers still takes over.
I am very vain and love to waste time admiring my own image.

I am an ancient fairy and my magic allows me to manipulate and 
dominate water. I don’t like to be recognized by humans, so I try to 
keep my powers hidden from prying eyes.

gifts.name: Blessing of the Defeated
gifts.description:
If your ally suffers a Wound or fails a Check, 
they will gain 1 Additional Success (or increase their OL by 1 in the case 
of an NPC) on their next action. Alternatively, once per Scenario, you can 
choose to have them recover 2 Soma or 1 Wound, or alternatively gain 2 XP . 
If an NPC achieves their Agenda’s goal thanks to your help, you recover 1 
Soma and gain 1 XP . 
I have a strong influence on people and my charm cannot be ignored.

gifts.name: The Lady’s Champion
gifts.description:
There’s always some fool who follows you around 
and proclaims themselves your Champion, until you lose all patience. The 
Storyteller creates an NPC with the following profile at the beginning of the 
Scenario:
OL Medium 5 - (3 Wounds)
Descriptor: A positive feature that identifies the identity and abilities of the 
aspiring Champion. A Downside that identifies total devotion, obsession, love, 
or admiration for Vivienne of the Lake.
Agenda: Help and protect Vivienne at all costs. Even if my lady tells me not to 
get in her way, I must do so to ensure her safety.

darkEgo.name: Dark Ego - Water Fairy
darkEgo.description:
Y ou can spend 1 Soma to create 2 small pools 
of lake water, three feet wide and five inches deep. The pools will be created 
on any surface, and you can create them anywhere within your field of vision. 
When you dip your feet into the water, you unleash your thousand-year-old 
fairy powers. Y ou can choose one of these effects as an additional action in 
any Exchange:
1. Recover 1 Wound you suffered during this Scene.
2. Move immediately to a place that you can see. No one can stop you, but 
you must end up with your feet in contact with the water.
3. Create a dense fog from a water source that limits visibility but has no 
effect on you.
4. Hit a target with a jet of water from a pool you create. This is a normal 
attack that requires a Position Check and causes 1 Wound.
darkEgo.trigger:
Dive into the water of a lake and drop your disguise, or give advice 
to someone you really care about.

actors.equipment:
Fine clothes / Wigs, tricks, and masks / A few trinkets the Order insists on calling 
“Treasures” / A small portrait of the only human I ever loved.

actors.name: Lost Stories Exclusives Hunter 6
actors.source: Broken Tales - Lost Stories - Exclusive Pre-Gen Hunters.pdf
descriptors:
Porziella, my faithful flea, is always with me and has guarded my 
back like a trusted servant. Over time, I have trained Porziella to 
perform various tasks, including very complex ones. Porziella loves 
human blood, and although this disgusts people, I try to satisfy her 
whenever I can.

I learned some magic tricks from seven bandits, all of them brothers, 
and I know about arcane arts. I am attracted to magic and want to 
gather all knowledge about it.

I am courageous and stubborn. When I speak about justice and 
equality, the passion that animates me touches people’s hearts. For me, 
the cause comes before everything and I am ready to take any action, 
even the most extreme.

gifts.name: Porziella the Faithful Flea
gifts.description:
Y our trusty flea follows you like a shadow. 
Porziella is an NPC under your full control with the following profile:
OL Medium 5 - (3 Wounds)
Descriptor: I am a flea the size of a dog, my skin is so hard and thick that not 
even a sword can pierce it.
Gift - Loyal Flea: Porziella always recognizes blood by its taste, which allows 
her to follow a trail or recognize who it belongs to without error. Once per 
Scenario, Porziella can shield Viola by taking 1 Wound in her place. If she 
does this, she will be out of combat until the end of the Scene. If Porziella is 
not present, Viola can spend 1 Soma to bring her into the Scene immediately, 
overcoming all obstacles and impediments.

gifts.name: The Magic of the Seven
gifts.description:
Once per Scenario, you can use any of the 
following powers, but you must have the appropriate Equipment.
1. Mase’s Earring: It allows you to hear a speech even through a wall.
2. Nardo’s Soap: Gives you 3 Additional Successes to free yourself from 
ropes and chains, or to slip away. 
3. C ola’s Razor: Allows you to inflict 1 Additional Wound with one attack. 
4. Micco’s Staff: Plants sprout to block a passageway; the Storyteller creates a Threat that can absorb up to 3 Wounds before yielding. 
5. Petrullo’s Water: Creates a jet of water that strikes up to 30 feet but does 
no damage. 
6. Ascadeo’s Rock: It can be thrown and will fall exactly where you want it 
to fall, without causing any damage. 
7. Ceccone’s Crossbow: Grants you 2 Additional Successes when you 
shoot a dart.

darkEgo.name: Dark Ego - Taking Destiny into My Own Hands
darkEgo.description:
Nothing and no one 
can hold you against your will. Y ou are free from all obstacles and can move 
at any time, even in the midst of battle, without anyone being able to block 
or harm you. By spending 1 Soma, you can automatically break down any 
environmental obstacle in your way, such as walls, doors, or a tangled web of 
brambles. Y our presence undermines the authority of the powerful: all NPCs 
tied to any kind of authority lower their OL by 1; all Hunters tied to faith or 
with strong leadership skills receive 1 Penalty per Check.
darkEgo.trigger:
Stand up for someone being oppressed, or openly denounce those 
who hold power over you.
Equipment: 
A staff sprouting tendrils / A large bar of soap / A sharp razor / A small 
pitcher of water / A perfectly polished rock / A light crossbow / A golden 
earring.
Soma
 6
XP
Wounds 
1.
2.
3.
Extra 
Wound.
I am the Princess of Altomonte, and I succeeded my father by taking full control of his lands. I have always rebelled against the old laws 
of the past, which placed all power in the hands of men. The strength of my ideas was unyielding, leading me to carry out serious acts of 
reprisal against the noble families most tied to the old patriarchal traditions. The Order intervened to stop me, but when they realized that 
taking me prisoner would make me a martyr, I was offered a deal: join the ranks of the Order to fight the darkness. In exchange, I have 
been promised favors and political power with which to change the male-dominated society of my era forever.

actors.name: Lost Stories Exclusives Hunter 7
actors.source: Broken Tales - Lost Stories - Exclusive Pre-Gen Hunters.pdf
actors.story:
Y ou start the Scenario with 6 Pebble Tokens. During a Scene, you can 
spend 1 Pebble to activate one of these effects:
1. Return to a place you have already visited, this happens very fast 
and allows you to arrive before anyone else, avoiding any possible 
obstacle.
2. Get information from the Storyteller about a Place’s weaknesses or 
details of a procedure, such as an arcane ritual or a guard shift.
3. Act immediately after another Hunter, but only to perform an action 
that is not intended to harm anyone. 
4. Pull a useful item from your bag to deal with a Threat that has arisen.
descriptors:
I have an unusual mind and remember every detail, even years 
later. My body is puny and I hate to do strenuous work.

I have charisma to spare and I am a smooth talker who commands 
respect and admiration. I must always have the last word.

It only takes me a few seconds to assess the situation and use it to 
my advantage. I have a soft spot for loving families who remind me 
of what I will never have.

gifts.name: Tiny
gifts.description:
Y ou know how to go unnoticed, so no one will ever pick you as 
a direct target of one of their actions if there is at least one other Hunter 
in the Scene. Y ou can spend 1 Soma to leave a location without anyone 
noticing, as long as there is at least one other Hunter to attract attention. 
Y ou get 1 Additional Success on each Check where you can use your 
diminutive stature, but you also get 1 Penalty on each Check where you 
have to use brute force or physical strength.

gifts.name: In the Right Place at the Right Time
gifts.description: Y ou don’t get confused easily.

darkEgo.name: Dark Ego - Infallible Cunning
darkEgo.description:
When you activate this Gift, the 
Storyteller will reveal to you the Downside of all NPCs in the Scene. 
Y ou’ll also learn the easiest way to escape from your location and the most 
valuable item present. When a Hunter (including you) performs a Check 
and gets a Standard Outcome, you can spend 1 Soma to add 1 Increment 
of your choice, including a special effect of a Gift possessed by the Hunter 
performing the action.
darkEgo.trigger:
Take a few minutes to observe the situation and tell the NPC in 
front of you what you really think of them. 
Equipment: 
A bag of white pebbles / Seven small gold crowns / Valuable coins and 
jewels / A mask with the features of an ogre / A pair of valuable traveling 
boots with two hidden stilettos / Contracts and records of secret negotiations 
/ The key to one of your many secret hideouts / A sling. 
Soma
 6
XP
Wounds 
1.
2.
3.
Extra 
Wound.
I am the most important criminal of my time, and there are more than a thousand scoundrels in my employ. I have 
single-handedly built up my power through cunning, even committing acts that many people consider despicable. 
Those who lecture me on my misdeeds do not understand that the only thing I wanted in my life was a family that loved 
me. The Order disrupted my criminal empire, but when they realized that eliminating me would start a war among 
outlaws across Europe, I was pardoned and welcomed as a Hunter. My gifts and knowledge ensure a constant flow 
of information, which I use to track down whatever the Order is hunting. Locked away in the fortress of my solitude, I 
continue to run my empire. Perhaps I can find a true family in the ranks of the Hunters.

actors.name: Lost Stories Exclusives Hunter 8
actors.source: Broken Tales - Lost Stories - Exclusive Pre-Gen Hunters.pdf
descriptors:
I am a skilled Hunter and know what it takes to survive in wild 
places. I find it hard to trust anyone, but when I do, I never question 
the good faith of the person I have chosen.

My senses are keen and my body is hardened by the outdoors. I hate 
big cities, hustle and bustle, and generally can’t stand people who talk 
too much.

I am trained to kill all kinds of beasts and know how to use the 
hunting grounds to my advantage. Monsters must always be 
destroyed, for them I see no mercy or redemption.

gifts.name: Hunting Companion
gifts.description:
Y ou don’t open your heart easily, but occasionally 
you find companions you can trust. At the beginning of the Scenario, you 
choose another Hunter as your hunting companion, who will receive 1 
Additional Success on all Defense Checks they make while you are in close 
proximity to cover their back. Y ou will always know where your hunting 
companion is and can spend 1 Soma to get to where they are, ignoring all 
obstacles. Y ou never speak and cannot express yourself verbally, but your 
companion will always clearly understand anything you try to tell them.

gifts.name: Stalking
gifts.description:
No prey can escape you, once per Scene you can find distinct 
traces in a place or on an object. The Storyteller will reveal a useful piece of 
information of your choice: who left the clue, where it is, or a weakness in the 
object. Y ou can spend 1 Soma to blend into your surroundings: as long as you 
do not take any conspicuous actions (at the Storyteller’s discretion), Minor 
NPCs will not be able to see you, and you will get 3 Additional Successes on 
any Checks you make to go unnoticed or catch someone off guard.

darkEgo.name: Dark Ego - It’s Time to Kill the Beast
darkEgo.description:
Once per Scene, if you make an 
attack against an enemy with monstrous characteristics, you automatically 
hit without a Check and your attack inflicts 2 Wounds. All of the Wounds 
you inflict leave clearly visible marks and cannot be healed by the victim 
until the end of the Scenario. When you activate this Gift, the Storyteller will 
reveal to you one Gift of each monstrous opponent in the Scene. 
Note: A “monstrous trait” is defined as any Hunter or NPC with Gifts or 
Descriptors that represent superhuman physical traits and abilities that also 
give them a monstrous appearance. However, the Storyteller has the final say 
on whether or not a Character is monstrous.
darkEgo.trigger:
Openly challenge a monstrous creature by revealing your true nature.
Equipment: 
The right weapon for each beast / A cloak that changes color according to 
its surroundings / A small leaf-shaped ocarina / Animal traps / A deer heart 
preserved under spirits / A necklace of wolf fangs. 
Soma
 6
XP
Wounds 
1.
2.
3.
Extra 
Wound.
I am a lone beast slayer who has dedicated his entire life to eradicating monsters and aberrations. The 
One Who Plots in the Shadows corrupted my soul by drawing on the pain of the monsters’ poor victims I 
could not save. The Order has freed me from this evil influence and welcomed me into its ranks as a strong 
arm against all manner of monsters. I do not like to talk or waste time with complicated plans: when it is 
time to begin the hunt, having my weapons ready is all that matters.

actors.name: Lost Stories Exclusives Hunter 9
actors.source: Broken Tales - Lost Stories - Exclusive Pre-Gen Hunters.pdf
descriptors:
I have extremely keen eyesight and no detail escapes me. I can see 
everything, even in the dark or in the thickest fog. Sometimes I don’t 
understand whether the things I see are real or just a figment of my 
imagination.

I am used to walking around completely naked, so my physique is 
tough. I hate having unnecessary things on me, except for my beloved 
crown.

I am good with words, I know etiquette, and I know how to dazzle the 
crowd. I cannot refrain from commenting with the utmost sincerity 
on the way my interlocutors dress.

gifts.name: What I Want to See
gifts.description:
If you see it, you can make it real. Y ou can spend 1 
Soma and say what object you have in front of you. For the rest of the Scene, 
you can use it as if it were real with all the characteristics it should have. Y ou 
get 1 Additional Success for each Check if you gain a genuine advantage due 
to the fact that others cannot see the object. Y ou can only have one object 
created by this Gift at a time. Y ou are completely immune to any effect based 
on reducing or nullifying the ability to see.

gifts.name: What I Don’t Want to See
gifts.description:
Y ou start each Scene in the shadows, and 
as long as you are in this state, no one will notice your presence or the fact 
that you are completely naked. As long as you do not perform actions that 
make you the center of attention, you can continue to do whatever you want 
without anyone getting in the way, and you will never be singled out for 
action by a possible enemy. Subjects who base their perception on senses 
other than sight can easily detect you. When you perform a conspicuous 
action or decide to draw attention to yourself, you shift into the light. As 
long as you are in this state, everyone will see you for what you really are. Y ou 
get 1 Additional Success on the first Check you make when you enter this 
state. Y ou can spend 1 Soma at any time to return to the shadows.

darkEgo.name: Dark Ego - All Eyes on Me
darkEgo.description:
When you choose to be the center of 
attention, you are the king of the party. Decide what you want to wear and 
what valuables you want to display, and you will look the part. Y ou will also 
receive the following benefits:
1. All NPCs present will be favorably disposed toward you, and you can 
create an Agenda for one of them to represent their strong interest in 
you. Particularly powerful subjects may require a Position Check, at the 
Storyteller’s discretion. 
2. If a lie is told in your presence, the person who told it suffers 1 Wound 
caused by bleeding from the eyes.
3. If you help someone permanently improve the aesthetics of a person or 
place, you gain 1 Soma. 
The effect of this Gift lasts until the end of the Scene or until you activate 
another of your Gifts.
darkEgo.trigger:
Take a few minutes to prepare for a meeting with someone you 
deem important. 
Equipment: 
The precious crown that I always wear on my head. 
Soma
 5
XP
Wounds 
1.
2.
3.
Extra 
Wound.
I was a vain ruler and had eyes only for beauty. My heart was pure and my desire to help others was 
sincere, but everyone took advantage of me and clouded my vision with false words. Seeing beyond the wall 
of lies cost me dearly, but now I am not afraid. I see everything as it is, even myself. The Order hired me as a 
Hunter, asking only that I use my power in the service of justice, without ulterior motives, without falsehood. 
But is that really the case? I no longer care, for now, the only truth that matters to me is the one I choose to 
create with my mind.
